---
title: "Production EWAS Code"
output: html_notebook
---

Note: All Heatmaps migrated over to Production_Heatmaps

Main EWAS
```{r}
# ewas_metastasis_h6_normImmune.R     · 2025-07-18
# Single HiTIMED h = 6 → immune-fraction normalisation + EpiScore
# Phenotypes: any_mets · ln_only · distant

## ── USER SETTINGS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
idat_v1  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/idats/"
idat_v2  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/25_samples/"
meta_csv <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

phenotypes          <- c(any  = "any_mets",
                         ln   = "ln_only",
                         dist = "distant")
variance_percentile <- 0.90  # 0 ⇒ keep all CpGs

## NEW: centralize outputs/caches here
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(minfi)
  library(sesame)
  library(ENmix)
  library(matrixStats)
  library(limma)
  library(sva)
  library(HiTIMED)
  library(EpiDISH)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(glue)
})

read_csv_silent <- function(file, ...) {
  if (utils::packageVersion("readr") >= "2.0.0") {
    readr::read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE, ...)
  } else {
    suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(file, ...))
  }
}

## ── 1) β-matrix (cached) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## NEW: cache under Results
cache_dir <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache")
dir.create(cache_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
beta_rds  <- file.path(cache_dir, "beta_comb_qc.rds")
## NEW: keep sample-origin manifests
manifest_csv <- file.path(cache_dir, "sample_manifest_v1_v2.csv")

read_pp <- function(path, tag) {
  rg  <- read.metharray.exp(path, recursive = TRUE, extended = TRUE, force = TRUE)
  bet <- getBeta(preprocessNoob(rg, dyeMethod = "single"))
  if (tag == "v2") bet <- betasCollapseToPfx(bet)
  bad <- ENmix::QCinfo(rg)$badCpG
  bet <- bet[ setdiff(rownames(bet), bad), , drop = FALSE]
  bet
}

## NEW: we’ll save sample IDs per platform so we can label Array_Version later
if (!file.exists(beta_rds)) {
  msg("Reading / normalising IDATs …")
  beta1 <- read_pp(idat_v1, "v1")
  beta2 <- read_pp(idat_v2, "v2")

  sample_ids_v1 <- colnames(beta1)
  sample_ids_v2 <- colnames(beta2)

  common    <- intersect(rownames(beta1), rownames(beta2))
  beta_comb <- cbind(beta1[common, , drop = FALSE],
                     beta2[common, , drop = FALSE])

  saveRDS(list(beta = beta_comb,
               sample_ids_v1 = sample_ids_v1,
               sample_ids_v2 = sample_ids_v2),
          beta_rds)

  ## write a small manifest for sanity/debug
  tibble(
    SampleID = c(sample_ids_v1, sample_ids_v2),
    Array_Version = c(rep("v1", length(sample_ids_v1)),
                      rep("v2", length(sample_ids_v2)))
  ) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    write_csv(manifest_csv)

  msg("β-matrix cached.")
} else {
  cache_obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
  if (is.list(cache_obj) && !is.null(cache_obj$beta)) {
    beta_comb     <- cache_obj$beta
    sample_ids_v1 <- cache_obj$sample_ids_v1
    sample_ids_v2 <- cache_obj$sample_ids_v2
  } else {
    ## backward compat if the RDS used to be only the matrix
    beta_comb     <- cache_obj
    sample_ids_v1 <- character(0)
    sample_ids_v2 <- character(0)
  }
  msg("β-matrix loaded from cache.")
}

##--- Remove sex linked probes--##
get_annotation_for <- function(beta_mat) {
  # Prefer EPIC; fallback to 450k
  if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(
      library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
    )
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  } else if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(
      library(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
    )
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
  } else {
    stop("Install an Illumina methylation annotation package (EPIC or 450k).")
  }
  # Keep rows that exist in your beta matrix
  a[rownames(a) %in% rownames(beta_mat), , drop = FALSE]
}

anno <- get_annotation_for(beta_comb)

# Try multiple possible chromosome fields across annotation versions
chr_vec <- NULL
if ("chr" %in% colnames(anno))       chr_vec <- anno$chr
if (is.null(chr_vec) && "CHR" %in% colnames(anno)) chr_vec <- anno$CHR
if (is.null(chr_vec) && "seqnames" %in% colnames(anno)) chr_vec <- as.character(anno$seqnames)

if (is.null(chr_vec)) stop("Could not find chromosome column in annotation.")

is_sex_chr <- chr_vec %in% c("chrX","chrY","X","Y")
sex_probes <- rownames(anno)[is_sex_chr]

n_before <- nrow(beta_comb)
if (length(sex_probes) > 0) {
  beta_comb <- beta_comb[setdiff(rownames(beta_comb), sex_probes), , drop = FALSE]
}
msg(length(sex_probes), " chrX/chrY probes removed; ",
    n_before, " → ", nrow(beta_comb), " CpGs remain.")

## ── Variance filter ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
M.mat <- log2(beta_comb / (1 - beta_comb) + 1e-6)
if (variance_percentile > 0) {
  var_thr   <- quantile(rowVars(M.mat, TRUE), variance_percentile)
  keep      <- rowVars(M.mat, TRUE) > var_thr
  beta_comb <- beta_comb[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  M.mat     <- M.mat[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  msg(sum(keep), " CpGs kept (top ",
      100 * (1 - variance_percentile), "% var).")
}

## ── 2a) Define & run EpiScore for fibroblasts ────────────────────────────────
data(centEpiFibIC.m)  # built-in colon-fibroblast reference

run_episcore <- function(beta) {
  common <- intersect(rownames(beta), rownames(centEpiFibIC.m))
  est    <- epidish(beta[common, ],
                    centEpiFibIC.m[common, ],
                    method = "RPC")$estF
  as.data.frame(est) * 100    # columns = Epi, Fib, IC
}

msg("Running EpiScore (RPC) for fibroblast …")
fib_scores <- run_episcore(beta_comb) %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")
# fib_scores has SampleID, Epi, Fib, IC

## ── 2b) HiTIMED deconvolution (h = 6) ────────────────────────────────────────
msg("Running HiTIMED  h = 6 …")
frac_h6 <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(beta_comb, "COAD", h = 6) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  left_join(fib_scores, by = "SampleID")
# now frac_h6 includes a "Fib" column (from EpiScore)

## ── 3) Collapse / normalise fractions ───────────────────────────────────────
collapse_frac <- function(df) {
  get_ <- function(x) if (x %in% names(df)) df[[x]] else 0
  
  imm_cols <- c("CD8mem","CD8nv","CD4mem","CD4nv",
                "Treg","Bmem","Bnv","DC","Mono","NK")
  totalImm <- rowSums(df[imm_cols], na.rm = TRUE)
  totalImm[totalImm == 0] <- NA
  
  tibble(
    SampleID     = df$SampleID,
    Tumor        = get_("Tumor"),
    Fibroblast   = get_("Fib"),       # now uses EpiScore Fib
    StromalOther = get_("Endothelial") + get_("Epithelial"),
    CD8_T        = (get_("CD8mem") + get_("CD8nv")) / totalImm,
    LymphOther   = (get_("CD4mem") + get_("CD4nv") +
                    get_("Treg")   + get_("Bmem") + get_("Bnv")) / totalImm
  ) %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), as.numeric))
}

## ── 4) Tier templates ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
tier_template <- list(
  Tier1 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num"),
  Tier2 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor"),
  Tier3 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor",
            "Fibroblast","StromalOther",
            "CD8_T","LymphOther")
)
trim_tiers <- function(tiers, avail) lapply(tiers, intersect, avail)

## ── 5) Loop over phenotypes ────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (pheno_tag in names(phenotypes)) {
  pheno_var <- phenotypes[[pheno_tag]]
  msg("\n===== ", pheno_var, " =====")
  
  meta <- read_csv_silent(meta_csv) %>%
    mutate(
      SampleID      = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
      any_mets      = as.integer(any_mets),
      distant       = as.integer(Distant_Mets),
      ln_only       = as.integer(ln_only),
      sex_num       = as.integer(sex == "M"),
      MLH1_num      = as.integer(MLH1 == 1)
    )

  ## NEW: assign Array_Version using the vectors we saved at read time
  meta <- meta %>%
    mutate(
      Array_Version = case_when(
        SampleID %in% sample_ids_v1 ~ "v1",
        SampleID %in% sample_ids_v2 ~ "v2",
        TRUE                        ~ NA_character_
      )
    )

  ## NEW: warn if any SampleID in meta not found in either list
  if (any(is.na(meta$Array_Version))) {
    miss <- meta$SampleID[is.na(meta$Array_Version)]
    msg("WARNING: ", length(miss), " meta SampleIDs not matched to v1/v2: ",
        paste(head(miss, 8), collapse = ", "),
        if (length(miss) > 8) " …" else "")
  }
  
  meta$pheno_bin <- dplyr::case_when(
    pheno_var == "any_mets" ~ meta$any_mets,
    pheno_var == "distant"  ~ meta$distant,
    pheno_var == "ln_only"  ~ (meta$ln_only & !meta$distant),
    TRUE                    ~ NA_integer_
  )
  stopifnot(all(meta$pheno_bin %in% 0:1, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  frac_df  <- collapse_frac(frac_h6)
  meta_all <- left_join(meta, frac_df, by = "SampleID")
  ok       <- complete.cases(meta_all[, tier_template$Tier3])
  meta_f   <- meta_all[ok, ]
  M_f      <- M.mat[, meta_f$SampleID, drop = FALSE]
  
  ## ComBat if both platforms are present after filtering
  if (length(unique(na.omit(meta_f$Array_Version))) > 1) {
    mod_cb <- model.matrix(~ age + sex_num + MLH1_num + pheno_bin, meta_f)
    M_cb   <- ComBat(M_f,
                     batch       = factor(meta_f$Array_Version),
                     mod         = mod_cb,
                     par.prior   = TRUE,
                     prior.plots = FALSE)
  } else {
    M_cb <- M_f
  }
  
  tier_list <- trim_tiers(tier_template, names(meta_f))
  fits <- purrr::map(tier_list, function(covs) {
    nz   <- covs[sapply(meta_f[covs], sd, TRUE) > 0]
    form <- if (length(nz) == 0) {
      ~ pheno_bin
    } else {
      as.formula(paste("~ pheno_bin +", paste(nz, collapse = " + ")))
    }
    des <- model.matrix(form, meta_f)
    eBayes(lmFit(M_cb, des), trend = TRUE, robust = TRUE)
  })
  
  ## NEW: write results under Results root
  out_dir <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{pheno_tag}"), "H6")
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  saveRDS(fits, file.path(out_dir, "ewas_fits.rds"))
  msg("✓  fits saved → ", out_dir)
}

msg("\n✅ Finished: Any, LN-only, Distant  (HiTIMED-h6, immune-normalised + EpiScore)")
```

Without Combat:
```{r}
# ewas_metastasis_h6_normImmune.R     · 2025-07-18
# Single HiTIMED h = 6 → immune-fraction normalisation + EpiScore
# Phenotypes: any_mets · ln_only · distant
# NOTE: ComBat is DISABLED — same-cohort v1/v2; using intersected probes instead.

## ── USER SETTINGS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
idat_v1  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/idats/"
idat_v2  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/25_samples/"
meta_csv <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

phenotypes          <- c(any  = "any_mets",
                         ln   = "ln_only",
                         dist = "distant")
variance_percentile <- 0.90  # 0 ⇒ keep all CpGs

## NEW: centralize outputs/caches here
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(minfi)
  library(sesame)
  library(ENmix)
  library(matrixStats)
  library(limma)
  # library(sva)   # <- not needed since ComBat is off
  library(HiTIMED)
  library(EpiDISH)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(glue)
})

read_csv_silent <- function(file, ...) {
  if (utils::packageVersion("readr") >= "2.0.0") {
    readr::read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE, ...)
  } else {
    suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(file, ...))
  }
}

## ── 1) β-matrix (cached) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## cache under Results
cache_dir <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache")
dir.create(cache_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
beta_rds      <- file.path(cache_dir, "beta_comb_qc.rds")
manifest_csv  <- file.path(cache_dir, "sample_manifest_v1_v2.csv")

read_pp <- function(path, tag) {
  rg  <- read.metharray.exp(path, recursive = TRUE, extended = TRUE, force = TRUE)
  bet <- getBeta(preprocessNoob(rg, dyeMethod = "single"))
  if (tag == "v2") bet <- betasCollapseToPfx(bet)
  bad <- ENmix::QCinfo(rg)$badCpG
  bet <- bet[ setdiff(rownames(bet), bad), , drop = FALSE]
  bet
}

## Save sample IDs per platform so we can label Array_Version later
if (!file.exists(beta_rds)) {
  msg("Reading / normalising IDATs …")
  beta1 <- read_pp(idat_v1, "v1")
  beta2 <- read_pp(idat_v2, "v2")

  sample_ids_v1 <- colnames(beta1)
  sample_ids_v2 <- colnames(beta2)

  common <- intersect(rownames(beta1), rownames(beta2))
  stopifnot(length(common) > 0)
  beta_comb <- cbind(beta1[common, , drop = FALSE],
                     beta2[common, , drop = FALSE])

  saveRDS(list(beta = beta_comb,
               sample_ids_v1 = sample_ids_v1,
               sample_ids_v2 = sample_ids_v2),
          beta_rds)

  tibble(
    SampleID = c(sample_ids_v1, sample_ids_v2),
    Array_Version = c(rep("v1", length(sample_ids_v1)),
                      rep("v2", length(sample_ids_v2)))
  ) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    write_csv(manifest_csv)

  msg("β-matrix cached.")
} else {
  cache_obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
  if (is.list(cache_obj) && !is.null(cache_obj$beta)) {
    beta_comb     <- cache_obj$beta
    sample_ids_v1 <- cache_obj$sample_ids_v1
    sample_ids_v2 <- cache_obj$sample_ids_v2
  } else {
    ## backward compat if the RDS used to be only the matrix
    beta_comb     <- cache_obj
    sample_ids_v1 <- character(0)
    sample_ids_v2 <- character(0)
  }
  msg("β-matrix loaded from cache.")
}

## --- Remove sex-linked probes ----------------------------------------------
get_annotation_for <- function(beta_mat) {
  if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19))
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  } else if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19))
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
  } else {
    stop("Install an Illumina methylation annotation package (EPIC or 450k).")
  }
  a[rownames(a) %in% rownames(beta_mat), , drop = FALSE]
}

anno <- get_annotation_for(beta_comb)

# Try multiple possible chromosome fields across annotation versions
chr_vec <- NULL
if ("chr" %in% colnames(anno))             chr_vec <- anno$chr
if (is.null(chr_vec) && "CHR" %in% colnames(anno))      chr_vec <- anno$CHR
if (is.null(chr_vec) && "seqnames" %in% colnames(anno)) chr_vec <- as.character(anno$seqnames)
if (is.null(chr_vec)) stop("Could not find chromosome column in annotation.")

is_sex_chr <- chr_vec %in% c("chrX","chrY","X","Y")
sex_probes <- rownames(anno)[is_sex_chr]

n_before <- nrow(beta_comb)
if (length(sex_probes) > 0) {
  beta_comb <- beta_comb[setdiff(rownames(beta_comb), sex_probes), , drop = FALSE]
}
msg(length(sex_probes), " chrX/chrY probes removed; ",
    n_before, " → ", nrow(beta_comb), " CpGs remain.")

## ── Variance filter (optional) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
M.mat <- log2(beta_comb / pmax(1 - beta_comb, 1e-6) + 1e-6)
if (variance_percentile > 0) {
  v <- rowVars(M.mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  var_thr <- quantile(v, variance_percentile, na.rm = TRUE)
  keep    <- v > var_thr
  beta_comb <- beta_comb[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  M.mat     <- M.mat[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  msg(sum(keep), " CpGs kept (top ", 100 * (1 - variance_percentile), "% var).")
}

## ── 2a) EpiScore for fibroblasts (RPC) ──────────────────────────────────────
data(centEpiFibIC.m)  # built-in colon-fibroblast reference

run_episcore <- function(beta) {
  common <- intersect(rownames(beta), rownames(centEpiFibIC.m))
  est    <- epidish(beta[common, ],
                    centEpiFibIC.m[common, ],
                    method = "RPC")$estF
  as.data.frame(est) * 100    # columns = Epi, Fib, IC
}

msg("Running EpiScore (RPC) for fibroblast …")
fib_scores <- run_episcore(beta_comb) %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")

## ── 2b) HiTIMED deconvolution (h = 6) ───────────────────────────────────────
msg("Running HiTIMED  h = 6 …")
frac_h6 <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(beta_comb, "COAD", h = 6) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  left_join(fib_scores, by = "SampleID")   # adds Fib from EpiScore

## ── 3) Collapse / normalise fractions ───────────────────────────────────────
collapse_frac <- function(df) {
  get_ <- function(x) if (x %in% names(df)) df[[x]] else 0
  imm_cols <- c("CD8mem","CD8nv","CD4mem","CD4nv","Treg","Bmem","Bnv","DC","Mono","NK")
  totalImm <- rowSums(df[imm_cols], na.rm = TRUE); totalImm[totalImm == 0] <- NA
  tibble(
    SampleID     = df$SampleID,
    Tumor        = get_("Tumor"),
    Fibroblast   = get_("Fib"),               # from EpiScore
    StromalOther = get_("Endothelial") + get_("Epithelial"),
    CD8_T        = (get_("CD8mem") + get_("CD8nv")) / totalImm,
    LymphOther   = (get_("CD4mem") + get_("CD4nv") +
                    get_("Treg")   + get_("Bmem") + get_("Bnv")) / totalImm
  ) %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), as.numeric))
}

## ── 4) Tier templates (unchanged design) ────────────────────────────────────
tier_template <- list(
  Tier1 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num"),
  Tier2 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor"),
  Tier3 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor",
            "Fibroblast","StromalOther",
            "CD8_T","LymphOther")
)
trim_tiers <- function(tiers, avail) lapply(tiers, intersect, avail)

## ── 5) Loop over phenotypes (NO ComBat) ─────────────────────────────────────
for (pheno_tag in names(phenotypes)) {
  pheno_var <- phenotypes[[pheno_tag]]
  msg("\n===== ", pheno_var, " =====")

  meta <- read_csv_silent(meta_csv) %>%
    mutate(
      SampleID      = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
      any_mets      = as.integer(any_mets),
      distant       = as.integer(Distant_Mets),
      ln_only       = as.integer(ln_only),
      sex_num       = as.integer(sex == "M"),
      MLH1_num      = as.integer(MLH1 == 1)
    )

  ## Use saved vectors to tag array version (for reference only)
  meta <- meta %>%
    mutate(
      Array_Version = case_when(
        SampleID %in% sample_ids_v1 ~ "v1",
        SampleID %in% sample_ids_v2 ~ "v2",
        TRUE                        ~ NA_character_
      )
    )

  if (any(is.na(meta$Array_Version))) {
    miss <- meta$SampleID[is.na(meta$Array_Version)]
    msg("WARNING: ", length(miss), " meta SampleIDs not matched to v1/v2: ",
        paste(head(miss, 8), collapse = ", "),
        if (length(miss) > 8) " …" else "")
  }

  meta$pheno_bin <- dplyr::case_when(
    pheno_var == "any_mets" ~ meta$any_mets,
    pheno_var == "distant"  ~ meta$distant,
    pheno_var == "ln_only"  ~ (meta$ln_only & !meta$distant),
    TRUE                    ~ NA_integer_
  )
  stopifnot(all(meta$pheno_bin %in% 0:1, na.rm = TRUE))

  frac_df  <- collapse_frac(frac_h6)
  meta_all <- left_join(meta, frac_df, by = "SampleID")
  ok       <- complete.cases(meta_all[, tier_template$Tier3])
  meta_f   <- meta_all[ok, , drop = FALSE]
  M_f      <- M.mat[, meta_f$SampleID, drop = FALSE]

  ## NO ComBat: same-cohort v1/v2 + intersected probes is sufficient
  M_cb <- M_f

  tier_list <- trim_tiers(tier_template, names(meta_f))
  fits <- purrr::map(tier_list, function(covs) {
    # Only numeric covariates with non-zero variance; use stats::sd explicitly
    is_var <- vapply(
      meta_f[covs],
      function(x) is.numeric(x) && is.finite(stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)) && stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0,
      logical(1)
    )
    nz <- covs[is_var]

    form <- if (length(nz) == 0) {
      ~ pheno_bin
    } else {
      as.formula(paste("~ pheno_bin +", paste(nz, collapse = " + ")))
    }
    des <- model.matrix(form, meta_f)
    eBayes(lmFit(M_cb, des), trend = TRUE, robust = TRUE)
  })

  ## write results under Results root
  out_dir <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{pheno_tag}"), "H6")
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  saveRDS(fits, file.path(out_dir, "ewas_fits.rds"))
  msg("✓  fits saved → ", out_dir)
}

msg("\n✅ Finished: Any, LN-only, Distant  (HiTIMED-h6, immune-normalised + EpiScore; NO ComBat)")
```

Venn Diagram
```{r}
################################################################################
# venn_diagram_progression.R  —  EWAS-based (no ANOVA object needed)
#
# Reads Tier3 fits from Any / LN / Distant metastasis,
# thresholds by p < cutoff, and builds the Venn diagram.
# Saves plot + region CSVs + membership matrix.
################################################################################

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(limma)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(ggvenn)
  library(glue)
  library(readr)
  library(tibble)
  library(dplyr)
})

## ---------------- 1) SETTINGS ---------------------------------------------- ##
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
p_cutoff     <- 1e-3

# Input EWAS fits (Tier3 results assumed inside)
fit_files <- c(
  any  = file.path(results_root, "results_ewas_any",  "H6", "ewas_fits.rds"),
  ln   = file.path(results_root, "results_ewas_ln",   "H6", "ewas_fits.rds"),
  dist = file.path(results_root, "results_ewas_dist", "H6", "ewas_fits.rds")
)

output_dir <- file.path(results_root, "venn_diagrams")
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

msg("\n===== Generating Venn diagram for progression (EWAS Tier3, no ANOVA) =====")

## ---------------- 2) LOAD FITS & EXTRACT SETS ----------------------------- ##
get_sig_cpgs <- function(fit_file) {
  if (!file.exists(fit_file)) return(character(0))
  fits <- readRDS(fit_file)
  fit3 <- if (inherits(fits$Tier3, "MArrayLM")) fits$Tier3 else fits$Tier3$fit
  tt   <- topTable(fit3, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf)
  rownames(tt[tt$P.Value < p_cutoff, , drop = FALSE])
}

cpg_sets <- list(
  `Any Metastasis`      = get_sig_cpgs(fit_files["any"]),
  `Lymph Node Only`     = get_sig_cpgs(fit_files["ln"]),
  `Distant Metastasis`  = get_sig_cpgs(fit_files["dist"])
)

sizes_str <- paste0(names(cpg_sets), ": ",
                    vapply(cpg_sets, length, integer(1)), collapse = " | ")
msg("Set sizes → ", sizes_str)

## ---------------- 3) PLOT & SAVE ------------------------------------------ ##
venn_plot <- ggvenn(
  cpg_sets,
  fill_color = c("#4C78A8", "#FECB52", "#E45756"),
  stroke_size = 0.6,
  set_name_size = 5,
  text_size = 4
) +
  labs(
    title = "Significant DMPs (Tier3, p < 0.001)",
    subtitle = NULL
  ) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0, face = "bold"))

plot_file <- file.path(output_dir, "venn_progression.pdf")
ggsave(plot_file, venn_plot, device = cairo_pdf, width = 7.5, height = 8, dpi = 300)
msg("✓ Venn diagram saved → ", plot_file)

## ---------------- 4) REGION CSVs + MEMBERSHIP ----------------------------- ##
A <- cpg_sets[["Any Metastasis"]]
B <- cpg_sets[["Lymph Node Only"]]
C <- cpg_sets[["Distant Metastasis"]]

u <- union; int <- intersect; sd <- setdiff

only_A <- sd(A, u(B, C))
only_B <- sd(B, u(A, C))
only_C <- sd(C, u(A, B))
A_B    <- sd(int(A, B), C)
A_C    <- sd(int(A, C), B)
B_C    <- sd(int(B, C), A)
A_B_C  <- Reduce(int, list(A, B, C))

write_region <- function(vec, stub) {
  out <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(stub, ".csv"))
  write_csv(tibble(CpG_ID = vec), out)
  msg("  - wrote ", stub, " (n=", length(vec), ")")
}

msg("Writing region CSVs …")
write_region(only_A, "CpGs_ONLY_AnyMets")
write_region(only_B, "CpGs_ONLY_LNonly")
write_region(only_C, "CpGs_ONLY_Distant")
write_region(A_B,    "CpGs_AnyMets_AND_LNonly_ONLY")
write_region(A_C,    "CpGs_AnyMets_AND_Distant_ONLY")
write_region(B_C,    "CpGs_LNonly_AND_Distant_ONLY")
write_region(A_B_C,  "CpGs_ALL_THREE")

all_cpgs <- sort(unique(c(A, B, C)))
membership <- tibble(
  CpG_ID            = all_cpgs,
  Any_Metastasis    = as.integer(all_cpgs %in% A),
  Lymph_Node_Only   = as.integer(all_cpgs %in% B),
  Distant_Metastasis= as.integer(all_cpgs %in% C)
) %>% mutate(SetCount = Any_Metastasis + Lymph_Node_Only + Distant_Metastasis)

master_csv <- file.path(output_dir, "CpG_membership_matrix.csv")
write_csv(membership, master_csv)
msg("✓ Membership matrix saved → ", master_csv)

msg("\n✅ Done.")
```



Volcano plots for figures:
```{r}
###############################################################################
#  volcano_plots_gg_all_tiers.R  –  publication-ready volcano plots (Tiers 1–3)
#  for Any mets, Lymph node mets, and Distant mets  [Helvetica everywhere]
###############################################################################
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(limma)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(ggrepel)
  library(ggrastr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(glue)
  library(tibble)
  library(rlang)
  library(latex2exp)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
})

## -------- central output root ----------------------------------------------
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"

## -------- phenotypes & directories (UNDER results_root) ---------------------
phen_dirs <- c(
  any  = file.path(results_root, "results_ewas_any"),
  ln   = file.path(results_root, "results_ewas_ln"),
  dist = file.path(results_root, "results_ewas_dist")
)
phen_labels <- c(
  any  = "Any metastasis",
  ln   = "Lymph node metastasis",
  dist = "Distant metastasis"
)

## -------- probe → primary gene symbol map ----------------------------------
anno <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
ucsc_raw <- anno$UCSC_RefGene_Name
ucsc_map <- ifelse(!is.na(ucsc_raw) & ucsc_raw != "", sub(";.*$", "", ucsc_raw), NA_character_)
gencode_raw <- anno$GencodeBasicV12_NAME
gencode_map <- vapply(gencode_raw, function(raw) {
  if (is.na(raw) || raw == "") NA_character_ else tail(strsplit(raw, ";")[[1]], 1)
}, FUN.VALUE = character(1))
probe2gene <- ifelse(!is.na(ucsc_map), ucsc_map,
                     ifelse(!is.na(gencode_map), gencode_map, NA_character_))
names(probe2gene) <- anno$Name

## -------- custom ggplot2 volcano function (Helvetica) ----------------------
make_volcano_gg <- function(tt,
                            lfc_cut = 0.2, p_cut = 1e-3, top_n = 15,
                            gene_map) {
  df <- tt %>%
    rownames_to_column("CpG") %>%
    mutate(
      Gene    = coalesce(na_if(gene_map[CpG], ""), CpG),
      negLogP = -log10(P.Value),
      Signif  = factor(dplyr::case_when(
        logFC >=  lfc_cut & P.Value < p_cut ~ "Hyper",
        logFC <= -lfc_cut & P.Value < p_cut ~ "Hypo",
        TRUE                                ~ "NS"
      ), levels = c("Hyper", "Hypo", "NS"))
    )

  df_ns  <- dplyr::filter(df, Signif == "NS")
  df_sig <- dplyr::filter(df, Signif != "NS")
  top_hits <- df_sig %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% slice_head(n = top_n)

  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = logFC, y = negLogP, color = Signif)) +
    geom_point_rast(data = df_ns, size = 1.6, alpha = 0.8, raster.dpi = 300) +
    geom_point(data = df_sig, size = 1.6, alpha = 0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(Hyper="firebrick", Hypo="dodgerblue", NS="grey65")) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_text_repel(data = top_hits,
                    aes(label = Gene),
                    size = 3, max.overlaps = Inf,
                    box.padding = 0.5, min.segment.length = 0) +
    labs(title = NULL, subtitle = NULL,
         x = expression(Log[2]~"fold change"),
         y = expression(-Log[10]~italic(P))) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12, base_family = "Helvetica") +
    theme(legend.position = "right")
}

## -------- main loop: phenotypes × tiers ------------------------------------
for (ph_tag in names(phen_dirs)) {
  ph_dir   <- phen_dirs[[ph_tag]]
  fit_file <- file.path(ph_dir, "H6", "ewas_fits.rds")
  if (!file.exists(fit_file)) next

  fits     <- readRDS(fit_file)
  plot_dir <- file.path(ph_dir, "H6", "plots_volcano_gg")
  dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  for (tier_nm in names(fits)) {
    fit_obj <- if (inherits(fits[[tier_nm]], "MArrayLM")) fits[[tier_nm]] else fits[[tier_nm]]$fit

    tt <- limma::topTable(fit_obj, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf,
                          p.value = 1, adjust.method = "none")

    volcano <- make_volcano_gg(tt, gene_map = probe2gene, top_n = 15)

    # Save legendless version for Illustrator (Helvetica preserved in PDF)
    volcano_no_title <- volcano +
      labs(title = NULL, subtitle = NULL) +
      theme(legend.position = "none")

    ggsave(
      filename = file.path(plot_dir, glue("{ph_tag}_{tier_nm}_volcano.pdf")),
      plot     = volcano_no_title,
      device   = cairo_pdf,
      width    = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300
    )
  }
}

message("✅  All volcano plots saved as 300-dpi PDFs under Results/<phen>/H6/plots_volcano_gg (Helvetica).")
```


Gene list:
```{r}
###############################################################################
# summarize_top_cpgs.R
# - For each phenotype (any, ln, dist):
#   - Creates summary tables for the Top 100 hyper/hypo CpGs.
#   - NEW: Creates a comprehensive table with ALL CpGs from the EWAS,
#     including gene annotations and beta values for every sample.
###############################################################################

## --------------- USER SETTINGS ------------------------------------------- ##
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
meta_csv_path <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv" # Path to metadata

h_level <- "H6"
tier    <- "Tier3"
top_n   <- 100

output_dir <- file.path(results_root, "results_summary")
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## --------------- SETUP ---------------------------------------------------- ##
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(limma); library(dplyr); library(glue)
  library(readr); library(tibble)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

get_epic_annotation <- function() {
  if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19))
    getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  } else {
    warning("EPIC annotation package not available; 'Gene' column will be NA.")
    NULL
  }
}

###############################################################################
##  NEW: 1. LOAD BETA MATRIX AND METADATA
###############################################################################
msg("Loading main beta matrix and metadata...")

beta_rds <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache", "beta_comb_qc.rds")
if (!file.exists(beta_rds)) {
  stop("Beta matrix cache file not found at: ", beta_rds)
}
# Assuming the RDS contains a list with a 'beta' element
beta_comb <- readRDS(beta_rds)$beta

meta <- read_csv(meta_csv_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
    Group = factor(if_else(any_mets == 1, "Metastasis", "No Metastasis"),
                   levels = c("No Metastasis", "Metastasis"))
  ) %>%
  # Filter to samples present in the beta matrix and arrange them
  filter(SampleID %in% colnames(beta_comb)) %>%
  arrange(Group)

# Order the beta matrix columns to match the ordered metadata
beta_comb_ordered <- beta_comb[, meta$SampleID]


###############################################################################
##  2. LOAD ALL EWAS RESULTS
###############################################################################
msg("Loading all EWAS results...")

phenotypes <- c("any", "ln", "dist")
all_results <- list()

for (ph_tag in phenotypes) {
  fit_file <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{ph_tag}"), h_level, "ewas_fits.rds")
  if (!file.exists(fit_file)) {
    warning(glue("Could not find fits file for phenotype '{ph_tag}'. Skipping."))
    next
  }
  fits <- readRDS(fit_file)
  if (!tier %in% names(fits)) {
    warning(glue("Tier '{tier}' not found for phenotype '{ph_tag}'. Skipping."))
    next
  }
  fit_obj <- fits[[tier]]; if (!inherits(fit_obj, "MArrayLM")) fit_obj <- fit_obj$fit
  tt <- topTable(fit_obj, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf, p.value = 1, adjust.method = "BH") %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("CpG_ID")
  all_results[[ph_tag]] <- tt
}
if (length(all_results) == 0) {
  stop("No EWAS results found.")
}

###############################################################################
##  3. LOAD/BUILD ANNOTATION MAP
###############################################################################
anno <- get_epic_annotation()
probe2gene <- NULL
if (!is.null(anno)) {
  gn <- as.character(anno$UCSC_RefGene_Name)
  gn <- sub(";.*$", "", gn)
  names(gn) <- as.character(anno$Name)
  probe2gene <- gn
}

###############################################################################
##  4. MAIN LOOP TO GENERATE TABLES FOR EACH PHENOTYPE
###############################################################################
for (primary_phenotype in phenotypes) {

  if (!primary_phenotype %in% names(all_results)) next
  
  msg(glue::glue("--- Generating tables for '{primary_phenotype}' ---"))
  primary_results <- all_results[[primary_phenotype]]

  # --- A. Generate and save the full data file with beta values ---
  
  # Get CpGs that are in both the EWAS results and the main beta matrix
  common_cpgs <- intersect(primary_results$CpG_ID, rownames(beta_comb_ordered))
  
  # Prepare the parts: stats, genes, and beta values
  stats_part <- primary_results %>% filter(CpG_ID %in% common_cpgs)
  gene_part  <- tibble(CpG_ID = common_cpgs, Gene = unname(probe2gene[common_cpgs]))
  beta_part  <- as.data.frame(beta_comb_ordered[common_cpgs, ]) %>% rownames_to_column("CpG_ID")
  
  # Join everything together
  full_data_table <- stats_part %>%
    left_join(gene_part, by = "CpG_ID") %>%
    left_join(beta_part, by = "CpG_ID") %>%
    # Reorder columns for clarity
    dplyr::select(CpG_ID, Gene, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val, everything())
    
  # Write out the full table
  out_full <- file.path(output_dir, glue::glue("Full_EWAS_Results_with_Betas_{primary_phenotype}.csv"))
  readr::write_csv(full_data_table, out_full)
  msg(glue::glue("✓ Saved full data: {basename(out_full)}"))

  # --- B. Generate and save the Top N summary tables (original functionality) ---
  
  top_hyper_ids <- primary_results %>%
    filter(is.finite(P.Value), logFC > 0) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% slice_head(n = top_n) %>% pull(CpG_ID)
  summary_table_hyper <- primary_results %>%
    filter(CpG_ID %in% top_hyper_ids) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% dplyr::select(CpG_ID, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val) %>%
    rename_with(~ glue("{.}_{primary_phenotype}"), .cols = -CpG_ID)

  top_hypo_ids <- primary_results %>%
    filter(is.finite(P.Value), logFC < 0) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% slice_head(n = top_n) %>% pull(CpG_ID)
  summary_table_hypo <- primary_results %>%
    filter(CpG_ID %in% top_hypo_ids) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% dplyr::select(CpG_ID, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val) %>%
    rename_with(~ glue("{.}_{primary_phenotype}"), .cols = -CpG_ID)

  # Add Gene column
  if (!is.null(probe2gene)) {
    summary_table_hyper <- summary_table_hyper %>% mutate(Gene = unname(probe2gene[CpG_ID]), .after = CpG_ID)
    summary_table_hypo  <- summary_table_hypo  %>% mutate(Gene = unname(probe2gene[CpG_ID]), .after = CpG_ID)
  }
  
  # Write out Top N tables
  out_hyper <- file.path(output_dir, glue("Top{top_n}_DMPs_Summary_from_{primary_phenotype}_hyper.csv"))
  out_hypo  <- file.path(output_dir, glue("Top{top_n}_DMPs_Summary_from_{primary_phenotype}_hypo.csv"))
  readr::write_csv(summary_table_hyper, out_hyper)
  readr::write_csv(summary_table_hypo,  out_hypo)
  msg(glue("✓ Saved Top {top_n} summary: {basename(out_hyper)}"))
  msg(glue("✓ Saved Top {top_n} summary: {basename(out_hypo)}"))
}

msg("\n✅ All summary tables created successfully.")
```




Obtaining information from the results
```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tibble)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
})

## ---- central results root ---------------------------------------------------
results_root  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
annot_out_dir <- file.path(results_root, "annotations")
dir.create(annot_out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

first_symbol <- function(x) sub(";.*$", "", ifelse(is.na(x), "", x))

## ---- robust saver -----------------------------------------------------------
.save_table <- function(df, out_path) {
  dir.create(dirname(out_path), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  readr::write_csv(df, out_path)
  info <- file.info(out_path)
  message(sprintf("✓ Wrote %s  (rows=%d, cols=%d, size=%.1f KB)",
                  out_path, nrow(df), ncol(df), info$size/1024))
  invisible(out_path)
}

## ---- annotate a vector of CpGs ---------------------------------------------
annotate_cpg_vector <- function(cpg_ids) {
  stopifnot(length(cpg_ids) > 0)

  # Pull annotation and coerce to data.frame
  anno <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  adf  <- as.data.frame(anno, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  # Determine which column holds probe IDs, or promote rownames
  idcol <- NULL
  for (cand in c("Name", "IlmnID", "ID", "TargetID")) {
    if (cand %in% names(adf)) { idcol <- cand; break }
  }
  if (is.null(idcol)) {
    # Fall back to rownames
    if (!is.null(rownames(adf)) && length(rownames(adf)) && nzchar(rownames(adf)[1])) {
      adf <- tibble::rownames_to_column(adf, var = "ProbeID")
      idcol <- "ProbeID"
    } else {
      stop("Could not locate a probe ID column (Name/IlmnID/ID/TargetID) or rownames in EPIC annotation.")
    }
  }

  # Columns we’d like if present
  desired_cols <- c(
    idcol, "chr","pos","Strand",
    "UCSC_RefGene_Name","UCSC_RefGene_Group",
    "Relation_to_Island","Island_Name",
    "Regulatory_Feature_Group","Enhancer",
    "OpenSea","N_Shore","S_Shore","N_Shelf","S_Shelf",
    "Probe_SNPs","Probe_SNPs.10","SNP_ID","SNP_DISTANCE","SNP_MINOR_ALLELE_FREQUENCY"
  )
  keep_cols <- intersect(desired_cols, names(adf))

  ann_tidy <- adf[, keep_cols, drop = FALSE] %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(CpG_ID = .data[[idcol]])

  # Ensure optional fields exist to avoid mutate errors
  if (!"UCSC_RefGene_Name"  %in% names(ann_tidy)) ann_tidy$UCSC_RefGene_Name  <- NA_character_
  if (!"UCSC_RefGene_Group" %in% names(ann_tidy)) ann_tidy$UCSC_RefGene_Group <- NA_character_

  # Add gene columns, arrange columns
  ann_tidy <- ann_tidy %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Gene_All   = .data$UCSC_RefGene_Name,
      Gene       = sub(";.*$", "", ifelse(is.na(.data$Gene_All), "", .data$Gene_All)),
      Gene_Group = .data$UCSC_RefGene_Group
    ) %>%
    dplyr::relocate(dplyr::any_of(c("CpG_ID","chr","pos","Strand","Gene","Gene_All","Gene_Group")), .before = 1) %>%
    dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(idcol)) %>%   # drop the original id column (now have CpG_ID)
    dplyr::relocate(CpG_ID, .before = 1)

  # Preserve input order; flag missing
  idx <- match(cpg_ids, ann_tidy$CpG_ID)
  out <- ann_tidy[idx, , drop = FALSE]
  out[["__found"]] <- !is.na(idx)
  out
}
## ---- annotate a CSV on disk -------------------------------------------------
annotate_cpg_csv <- function(in_csv,
                             cpg_col = NULL,
                             out_csv = NULL) {

  df <- readr::read_csv(in_csv, show_col_types = FALSE)

  # infer CpG column if not provided
  if (is.null(cpg_col)) {
    candidates <- intersect(c("CpG_ID","CpG","Probe_ID","cgid","ID","Name"), names(df))
    if (!length(candidates)) {
      cg_cols <- names(df)[vapply(df, function(x) any(grepl("^cg\\d+$", as.character(x))), logical(1))]
      if (length(cg_cols)) candidates <- cg_cols[1]
    }
    if (!length(candidates)) stop("Could not infer the CpG column; set cpg_col.")
    cpg_col <- candidates[1]
  }

  # default output path under Results/annotations with suffix
  if (is.null(out_csv)) {
    base <- sub("\\.csv$", "", basename(in_csv))
    out_csv <- file.path(annot_out_dir, paste0(base, "_ANNOTATED.csv"))
  } else {
    # if user passed a directory, write inside it using input basename
    if (dir.exists(out_csv)) {
      base <- sub("\\.csv$", "", basename(in_csv))
      out_csv <- file.path(out_csv, paste0(base, "_ANNOTATED.csv"))
    } else {
      dir.create(dirname(out_csv), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
    }
  }

  # annotate and join
  cpgs <- df[[cpg_col]] |> as.character() |> unique()
  ann  <- annotate_cpg_vector(cpgs)

  res <- df %>%
    left_join(dplyr::select(ann, -Gene_All), by = setNames("CpG_ID", cpg_col))

  .save_table(res, out_csv)

  # quick heads-up for any misses
  missing <- ann %>% dplyr::filter(!`__found`) %>% dplyr::pull(CpG_ID)
  if (length(missing)) {
    message(length(missing), " CpG IDs not found in EPIC anno (hg19). Example: ",
            paste(utils::head(missing, 5), collapse = ", "), " …")
  }
  invisible(res)
}

## ---- CALL THE ANNOTATOR ON ONE FILE & VERIFY -------------------------------
# Pick one of your summary CSVs (change this to whichever you want to annotate)
in_csv  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results/results_summary/Top100_DMPs_Summary_from_ln_hyper.csv"

# Choose an explicit output path (so there’s no ambiguity)
out_csv <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results/annotations/Top100_DMPs_Summary_from_ln_hyper_ANNOTATED.csv"

# Make sure the output directory exists
dir.create(dirname(out_csv), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Call the function (this writes to disk internally via .save_table)
res <- annotate_cpg_csv(in_csv, cpg_col = "CpG_ID", out_csv = out_csv)

# Double-check that the file now exists (and report size)
if (file.exists(out_csv)) {
  info <- file.info(out_csv)
  message(sprintf("✅ Wrote file: %s (rows=%d, cols=%d, size=%.1f KB)",
                  out_csv, nrow(res), ncol(res), info$size/1024))
} else {
  stop("❌ Expected output not found at: ", out_csv,
       "\nCheck that `in_csv` path is correct and the function ran without errors.")
}
```

Genomic Regions plot for figure
```{r}
## ── SETUP: Load Libraries ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(limma)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
  library(annotatr)
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(purrr)
  library(cowplot)    # get_legend, ggdraw
  library(glue)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
})

## ── 0) PATHS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
plot_dir     <- file.path(results_root, "plots", "location_mix")
dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

## ── 1) SETTINGS AND CUSTOM COLORS ─────────────────────────────────────────────
phenotypes_to_run <- c(
  "Any Mets" = "any",
  "LN Only"  = "ln",
  "Distant"  = "dist"
)
p_value_cutoff <- 0.001
location_colors <- c(
  "CGI"       = "#E3777A",
  "CGI Shore" = "#B3E7FF",
  "CGI Shelf" = "#F08F00",
  "Promoter"  = "#B4A0C9",
  "Open Sea"  = "#768692"
)

## ── 2) HELPER FUNCTION TO RUN ANALYSIS PER PHENOTYPE ─────────────────────────
analyze_phenotype <- function(pheno_long_name, pheno_short_name) {
  message("\nProcessing: ", pheno_long_name)
  fit_file <- file.path(glue("results_ewas_{pheno_short_name}"), "H6", "ewas_fits.rds")
  if (!file.exists(file.path(results_root, fit_file))) {
    warning("Fit file not found for ", pheno_long_name, " at ", file.path(results_root, fit_file))
    return(NULL)
  }
  fits      <- readRDS(file.path(results_root, fit_file))
  fit_model <- fits$Tier3
  if (!inherits(fit_model, "MArrayLM")) fit_model <- fit_model$fit

  dmp_results <- topTable(fit_model, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf)
  top_hits <- dmp_results %>%
    filter(P.Value < p_value_cutoff) %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("CpG_ID")

  if (nrow(top_hits) == 0) {
    warning("No hits found for ", pheno_long_name, " at p < ", p_value_cutoff)
    return(NULL)
  }

  sites_to_annotate_df <- locations_df %>% filter(CpG_ID %in% top_hits$CpG_ID)
  sites_to_annotate_gr <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(sites_to_annotate_df, keep.extra.columns = TRUE)

  annotated_regions <- annotate_regions(
    regions      = sites_to_annotate_gr,
    annotations  = annotations,
    ignore.strand= TRUE,
    quiet        = TRUE
  )

  as.data.frame(annotated_regions) %>%
    left_join(dplyr::select(top_hits, CpG_ID, logFC), by = "CpG_ID") %>%
    mutate(
      Phenotype = pheno_long_name,
      Status    = ifelse(logFC > 0, "Hypermethylated", "Hypomethylated")
    )
}

## ── 3) RUN THE FULL ANALYSIS FOR ALL PHENOTYPES ──────────────────────────────
message("Building annotation database…")
annots <- c('hg19_cpgs', 'hg19_cpgshores', 'hg19_cpgshelves', 'hg19_genes_promoters')
annotations <- build_annotations(genome = 'hg19', annotations = annots)

message("Loading array locations…")
array_locations <- getLocations(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
locations_df <- as.data.frame(array_locations) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("CpG_ID") %>%
  dplyr::select(CpG_ID, chr = seqnames, start, end) %>%
  distinct(CpG_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

all_annotated_hits <- map2_dfr(
  names(phenotypes_to_run),
  phenotypes_to_run,
  analyze_phenotype
)

## ── 3b) BACKGROUND “ALL CpGs” CONTROL BAR ────────────────────────────────────
build_background_control <- function(phenotypes_to_run, locations_df, annotations) {
  first_pheno_tag <- unname(phenotypes_to_run[1])  # e.g., "any"
  fit_file <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{first_pheno_tag}"), "H6", "ewas_fits.rds")
  if (!file.exists(fit_file)) stop("Fit file not found at: ", fit_file)
  fits <- readRDS(fit_file)
  fit3 <- fits$Tier3; if (!inherits(fit3, "MArrayLM")) fit3 <- fit3$fit

  cpg_universe <- rownames(fit3$coefficients)
  if (!length(cpg_universe)) stop("Empty CpG universe from Tier3 coefficients.")

  bg_df <- locations_df %>% filter(CpG_ID %in% cpg_universe) %>% distinct(CpG_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)
  if (!nrow(bg_df)) stop("No CpG coordinates matched the CpG universe.")

  bg_gr <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(bg_df, keep.extra.columns = TRUE)
  bg_annot <- annotate_regions(bg_gr, annotations, ignore.strand = TRUE, quiet = TRUE) %>% as.data.frame()

  bg_base <- bg_annot %>% transmute(Phenotype = "All CpGs", Status = NA_character_, annot.type)
  bind_rows(
    mutate(bg_base, Status = "Hypermethylated"),
    mutate(bg_base, Status = "Hypomethylated")
  )
}
background_bar <- build_background_control(phenotypes_to_run, locations_df, annotations)

## ── 4) PLOTTING HELPER (Helvetica, 300 dpi PDF) ──────────────────────────────
create_summary_plot <- function(data, plot_status, colors, background_df) {
  plot_data <- bind_rows(data, background_df) %>%
    filter(Status == plot_status) %>%
    mutate(
      Location = case_when(
        grepl("islands",   annot.type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "CGI",
        grepl("shores",    annot.type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "CGI Shore",
        grepl("shelves",   annot.type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "CGI Shelf",
        grepl("promoters", annot.type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Promoter",
        TRUE                                               ~ "Open Sea"
      ),
      Location = factor(Location, levels = names(colors)),
      Phenotype = factor(Phenotype, levels = c("All CpGs", names(phenotypes_to_run)))
    )

  if (!nrow(plot_data)) {
    return(ggplot() +
             labs(title = plot_status, subtitle = "No significant sites found") +
             theme_void(base_family = "Helvetica"))
  }

  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Phenotype, fill = Location)) +
    geom_bar(position = "fill", width = 0.8, stat = "count") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors, name = "Genomic Location") +
    scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = 0.1)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14, base_family = "Helvetica") +
    theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      axis.text.x     = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      plot.background = element_blank(),
      panel.background= element_blank()
    )
}

## ── 5) BUILD PLOTS, EXTRACT LEGEND, SAVE ─────────────────────────────────────
plot_hyper_with_legend <- create_summary_plot(all_annotated_hits, "Hypermethylated", location_colors, background_bar)
plot_hypo_with_legend  <- create_summary_plot(all_annotated_hits, "Hypomethylated",  location_colors, background_bar)

# Extract legend as a gtable and wrap for ggsave
shared_legend_gt <- cowplot::get_legend(plot_hyper_with_legend)
legend_plot      <- cowplot::ggdraw(shared_legend_gt)

# Drop legends for the main panels
plot_hyper <- plot_hyper_with_legend + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_hypo  <- plot_hypo_with_legend  + theme(legend.position = "none")

# Save PDFs (Helvetica, cairo, 300 dpi)
ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, "hypermethylated_plot.pdf"),
       plot = plot_hyper, device = cairo_pdf, width = 4, height = 4, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, "hypomethylated_plot.pdf"),
       plot = plot_hypo,  device = cairo_pdf, width = 4, height = 4, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, "plot_legend.pdf"),
       plot = legend_plot, device = cairo_pdf, width = 4, height = 2, dpi = 300)

# Optional on-screen preview
# print(plot_hyper); print(plot_hypo); print(legend_plot)
```

```{r}
# FINAL SCRIPT WITH DEBUGGING in the plotting function.
# Please run this and share the console output.

## ── SETUP: Load Libraries ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(limma); library(dplyr); library(ggplot2); library(patchwork)
  library(annotatr); library(GenomicRanges); library(purrr)
  library(cowplot); library(glue); library(forcats)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
})

## ── 0) PATHS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
plot_dir     <- file.path(results_root, "plots", "location_summary_debug") # New folder for debug output
dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

## ── 1) SETTINGS AND CUSTOM COLORS ─────────────────────────────────────────────
phenotypes_to_run <- c("Any Mets" = "any", "LN Only"  = "ln", "Distant"  = "dist")
p_value_cutoff <- 0.001
location_colors <- c(
  "CGI"         = "#E3777A", "CGI Shore"   = "#B3E7FF", "CGI Shelf"   = "#F08F00",
  "Promoter"    = "#B4A0C9", "Open Sea"    = "#768692"
)
location_categories <- c("CGI", "CGI Shore", "CGI Shelf", "Promoter", "Open Sea")

## ── 2) ANALYSIS FUNCTIONS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# ... (analyze_phenotype and run_enrichment_test are unchanged) ...
map_to_location <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Location = case_when(
      grepl("islands", annot.type, ignore.case = TRUE)   ~ "CGI",
      grepl("shores",  annot.type, ignore.case = TRUE)   ~ "CGI Shore",
      grepl("shelves", annot.type, ignore.case = TRUE)   ~ "CGI Shelf",
      grepl("promoters", annot.type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Promoter",
      TRUE ~ "Open Sea"
    )) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Location = factor(Location, levels = location_categories))
}
analyze_phenotype <- function(pheno_long_name, pheno_short_name) {
  message("\nProcessing: ", pheno_long_name)
  fit_file <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{pheno_short_name}"), "H6", "ewas_fits.rds")
  if (!file.exists(fit_file)) return(NULL)
  fits      <- readRDS(fit_file)
  fit_model <- if (inherits(fits$Tier3, "MArrayLM")) fits$Tier3 else fits$Tier3$fit
  dmp_results <- topTable(fit_model, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf)
  top_hits <- dmp_results %>% dplyr::filter(P.Value < p_value_cutoff) %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("CpG_ID")
  if (nrow(top_hits) == 0) return(NULL)
  sites_df <- locations_df %>% dplyr::filter(CpG_ID %in% top_hits$CpG_ID)
  sites_gr <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(sites_df, keep.extra.columns = TRUE)
  annotated <- annotate_regions(sites_gr, annotations, ignore.strand = TRUE, quiet = TRUE)
  as.data.frame(annotated) %>%
    map_to_location() %>%
    dplyr::left_join(top_hits, by = "CpG_ID") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Phenotype = pheno_long_name, Status = ifelse(logFC > 0, "Hypermethylated", "Hypomethylated"))
}
run_enrichment_test <- function(dmp_df, background_df) {
  background_props <- background_df %>%
    dplyr::count(Location) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(prop = n / sum(n))
  dmp_df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Phenotype, Status) %>%
    tidyr::nest() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(test_result = map(data, function(subset_df) {
      observed_counts <- subset_df %>%
        dplyr::count(Location) %>%
        dplyr::right_join(tibble(Location = location_categories), by = "Location") %>%
        dplyr::mutate(n = ifelse(is.na(n), 0, n)) %>%
        dplyr::arrange(factor(Location, levels = location_categories)) %>%
        dplyr::pull(n)
      test <- chisq.test(x = observed_counts, p = background_props$prop, simulate.p.value = FALSE)
      tibble(P = test$p.value)
    })) %>%
    dplyr::select(Phenotype, Status, test_result) %>%
    tidyr::unnest(test_result)
}

################################################################################
### --- DEBUGGING VERSION of create_summary_plot_with_stats --- ###
################################################################################
create_summary_plot_with_stats <- function(data, plot_status, colors, background_df, stats_df) {
  
  message(glue("\n--- Debugging plot for Status: {plot_status} ---"))
  
  plot_data <- bind_rows(data, background_df) %>%
    dplyr::filter(Status == plot_status | Phenotype == "All CpGs") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Phenotype = factor(Phenotype, levels = c("All CpGs", names(phenotypes_to_run))))

  message("1. Head of the full stats table ('stats_df') passed to this function:")
  print(head(stats_df))
  
  # Filter to the current status (e.g., "Hypermethylated")
  stats_for_status <- stats_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Status == plot_status)
    
  message(glue("2. Filtered stats table to just '{plot_status}' (found {nrow(stats_for_status)} rows):"))
  print(stats_for_status)

  # Now, filter by P-value
  stars_to_add <- stats_for_status %>%
    dplyr::filter(P < 0.05)
    
  message(glue("3. Filtered for P < 0.05 (found {nrow(stars_to_add)} rows to plot):"))
  print(stars_to_add)

  # The rest of the function continues...
  if (nrow(stars_to_add) > 0) {
    stars_to_add <- stars_to_add %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        stars = case_when(P < 0.001 ~ "***",
                          P < 0.01  ~ "**",
                          TRUE      ~ "*"),
        Phenotype = factor(Phenotype, levels = c("All CpGs", names(phenotypes_to_run))),
        y = 1.05
      )
  }

  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Phenotype, fill = Location)) +
    geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "count", width = 0.8) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors, name = "Genomic Location") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = plot_status) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14, base_family = "Helvetica") +
    theme(legend.position = "right", axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

  if (nrow(stars_to_add) > 0) {
    p <- p + geom_text(
      data = stars_to_add,
      aes(x = Phenotype, y = y, label = stars),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      size = 8, vjust = 0
    )
  }
  return(p)
}


## ── 3) RUN PIPELINE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
message("Building annotation database…")
annotations <- build_annotations("hg19", c("hg19_cpgs", "hg19_cpgshores", "hg19_cpgshelves", "hg19_genes_promoters"))
message("Loading array locations…")
locations_df <- getLocations(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("CpG_ID") %>%
  dplyr::select(CpG_ID, chr = seqnames, start, end) %>% distinct(CpG_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

all_annotated_hits <- map2_dfr(names(phenotypes_to_run), phenotypes_to_run, analyze_phenotype)
background_mapped <- annotate_regions(makeGRangesFromDataFrame(locations_df), annotations, ignore.strand=TRUE, quiet=TRUE) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% map_to_location()

enrichment_stats <- run_enrichment_test(all_annotated_hits, background_mapped)
write.csv(enrichment_stats, file.path(plot_dir, "enrichment_stats_chisq_simulated_debug.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

## ── 4) PLOTS & SAVE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
background_for_plot <- background_mapped %>%
  transmute(Phenotype = "All CpGs", Status = NA_character_, Location) %>%
  bind_rows(mutate(., Status = "Hypermethylated"), mutate(., Status = "Hypomethylated"))

plot_hyper <- create_summary_plot_with_stats(all_annotated_hits, "Hypermethylated", location_colors, background_for_plot, enrichment_stats)
plot_hypo  <- create_summary_plot_with_stats(all_annotated_hits, "Hypomethylated", location_colors, background_for_plot, enrichment_stats)
legend     <- cowplot::get_legend(plot_hyper)
plot_hyper_nolegend <- plot_hyper + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_hypo_nolegend  <- plot_hypo  + theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, "hypermethylated_plot_debug.pdf"), plot_hyper_nolegend, device = cairo_pdf, width = 4.5, height = 4.5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, "hypomethylated_plot_debug.pdf"), plot_hypo_nolegend,  device = cairo_pdf, width = 4.5, height = 4.5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, "plot_legend.pdf"), cowplot::ggdraw(legend), device = cairo_pdf, width = 4, height = 2, dpi = 300)
```



Clustering + Use this UMAP for the paper
```{r}
###############################################################################
# CpG-level PCA & UMAP (points = CpGs), colored by metastasis group with
# highest mean methylation across samples.
#
# This version is robust to missing M_all / CpG column naming, and will:
#   - Create M_all from M_cb / M.mat / cached betas if needed
#   - Derive MetastasisStatus in meta_f if missing
#   - Accept tt with CpG IDs in either a 'CpG'/'CpG_ID' column or rownames
# Outputs: PDFs @ 300 dpi to .../Results/cpg_embeddings
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(tibble)
  library(matrixStats)
  library(uwot)
})

set.seed(12345)

## -------- central output root ----------------------------------------------
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
out_dir      <- file.path(results_root, "cpg_embeddings")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## -------- 0) Ensure M_all + meta_f exist & align ---------------------------
# Try to construct M_all if it's not already in the session
if (!exists("M_all")) {
  message("[init] M_all not found; attempting to construct it…")
  if (exists("M_cb")) {
    message("  -> using M_cb")
    M_all <- M_cb
  } else if (exists("M.mat")) {
    message("  -> using M.mat")
    M_all <- M.mat
  } else {
    cache_betas <- file.path(results_root, "results_ewas_cache", "beta_comb_qc.rds")
    if (file.exists(cache_betas)) {
      message("  -> computing M from cached betas: ", cache_betas)
      beta_tmp <- readRDS(cache_betas)
      # log2( β/(1-β) ), with eps for stability
      eps <- 1e-6
      M_all <- log2(pmax(beta_tmp, eps) / pmax(1 - beta_tmp, eps))
      rm(beta_tmp)
    } else {
      stop("M_all is missing and no M_cb/M.mat/cached betas found at:\n  ",
           cache_betas, "\nPlease load one of these and re-run.")
    }
  }
}
stopifnot(is.matrix(M_all), nrow(M_all) > 0, ncol(M_all) > 0)

if (!exists("meta_f")) stop("meta_f is not in the session; load your metadata with SampleID + metastasis flags.")
stopifnot("SampleID" %in% colnames(meta_f))

## -------- 1) Configure CpG selection ---------------------------------------
p_cutoff     <- 0.05
max_sig_cpgs <- 5000
top_var_k    <- 5000

## -------- 2) Ensure metastasis labels exist --------------------------------
if (!"MetastasisStatus" %in% colnames(meta_f)) {
  guess_cols <- c("any_mets","distant","ln_only")
  if (!all(guess_cols %in% colnames(meta_f))) {
    stop("meta_f lacks MetastasisStatus and I cannot find columns any_mets/distant/ln_only to derive it.")
  }
  meta_f <- meta_f %>%
    mutate(
      MetastasisStatus = case_when(
        distant == 1 ~ "Distant",
        ln_only == 1 ~ "Lymph_Node",
        any_mets == 0 ~ "No_Mets",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
}
meta_f$MetastasisStatus <- factor(meta_f$MetastasisStatus,
                                  levels = c("No_Mets","Lymph_Node","Distant"))

# Align metadata to matrix columns (intersection only)
common_samples <- intersect(meta_f$SampleID, colnames(M_all))
if (length(common_samples) == 0) {
  stop("No overlap between meta_f$SampleID and colnames(M_all). Check naming.")
}
meta_f <- meta_f[match(common_samples, meta_f$SampleID), , drop = FALSE]
M_all  <- M_all[, common_samples, drop = FALSE]

## -------- 3) Select CpG sets -----------------------------------------------
## -------- 3) Select CpG sets (robust CpG ID detection) ----------------------
tt_df <- as.data.frame(tt, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Try to promote rownames if they look like cg IDs (even partially)
rn <- rownames(tt_df)
looks_like_cg <- !is.null(rn) && any(grepl("^cg\\d+$", rn))

if (looks_like_cg) {
  tt_df <- tibble::rownames_to_column(tt_df, var = "CpG")
} else if ("CpG" %in% names(tt_df)) {
  # already there
} else if ("CpG_ID" %in% names(tt_df)) {
  tt_df <- dplyr::rename(tt_df, CpG = CpG_ID)
} else if ("Probe_ID" %in% names(tt_df)) {
  tt_df <- dplyr::rename(tt_df, CpG = Probe_ID)
} else if ("ID" %in% names(tt_df)) {
  tt_df <- dplyr::rename(tt_df, CpG = ID)
} else {
  stop(
    paste0(
      "Could not locate CpG IDs in 'tt'.\n",
      "names(tt): ", paste(names(tt_df), collapse = ", "), "\n",
      "head(rownames(tt)): ", paste(utils::head(rn %||% character(0)), collapse = ", "), "\n",
      "Tip: ensure you built tt with limma::topTable(..., number = Inf) so CpG IDs stay in rownames."
    )
  )
}

if (!("P.Value" %in% names(tt_df))) {
  stop("Expected a P.Value column in tt/topTable output.")
}

# Now select sets
sig_cpgs <- tt_df %>%
  dplyr::distinct(CpG, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::filter(P.Value < p_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
  dplyr::pull(CpG) %>%
  intersect(rownames(M_all)) %>%
  utils::head(max_sig_cpgs)

rv <- matrixStats::rowVars(M_all, na.rm = TRUE)
top_var_cpgs <- names(sort(rv, decreasing = TRUE)) %>%
  intersect(rownames(M_all)) %>%
  utils::head(top_var_k)

message("=== Summary ===")
message("Significant CpGs available: ", length(sig_cpgs))
message("Top-variance CpGs available: ", length(top_var_cpgs))
## -------- 4) Assign CpG to group with highest mean --------------------------
assign_cpg_group <- function(M_sub, meta_df, group_col = "MetastasisStatus") {
  grp_levels <- levels(meta_df[[group_col]])
  stopifnot(!is.null(grp_levels))
  split_idx <- split(seq_len(nrow(meta_df)), meta_df[[group_col]])

  out <- vapply(seq_len(nrow(M_sub)), function(i) {
    means <- vapply(
      split_idx,
      function(ix) if (length(ix)) mean(M_sub[i, ix], na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
      numeric(1)
    )
    means[is.na(means)] <- -Inf
    grp <- names(means)[which.max(means)]
    if (is.infinite(max(means))) NA_character_ else grp
  }, FUN.VALUE = character(1))

  factor(out, levels = grp_levels)
}

## -------- 5) UMAP runner ----------------------------------------------------
run_umap <- function(X,
                     n_neighbors = 15,
                     min_dist = 0.3,
                     metric = "cosine",
                     pca = max(2, min(30, ncol(X) - 1)),
                     repulsion_strength = 1,
                     set_op_mix_ratio = 1,
                     dens_scale = NULL,
                     seed = 123) {
  set.seed(seed)
  uwot::umap(
    X,
    n_neighbors = n_neighbors,
    min_dist    = min_dist,
    metric      = metric,
    pca         = pca,
    repulsion_strength = repulsion_strength,
    set_op_mix_ratio   = set_op_mix_ratio,
    dens_scale  = dens_scale,
    verbose     = FALSE
  )
}

## -------- 6) Main worker: PCA+UMAP and save ---------------------------------
run_cpg_embeddings <- function(cpg_ids, tag) {
  cpg_ids <- intersect(cpg_ids, rownames(M_all))
  if (length(cpg_ids) < 3) {
    warning("Not enough CpGs in ", tag, " — skipping.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  M_sub <- M_all[cpg_ids, , drop = FALSE]

  # Z-score CpGs across samples
  X <- t(scale(t(M_sub), center = TRUE, scale = TRUE))
  X[!is.finite(X)] <- 0

  # PCA (rows = CpGs / observations)
  pca <- try(prcomp(X, center = FALSE, scale. = FALSE), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(pca, "try-error")) {
    warning("PCA failed for ", tag)
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  pca_df <- tibble(
    CpG = rownames(X),
    PC1 = pca$x[, 1],
    PC2 = pca$x[, 2]
  )

  # UMAP
  um <- run_umap(X)
  um_df <- tibble(
    CpG   = rownames(X),
    UMAP1 = um[, 1],
    UMAP2 = um[, 2]
  )

  # Color by group with highest mean M-value
  grp <- assign_cpg_group(M_sub, meta_f, "MetastasisStatus")
  pca_df$Group <- grp
  um_df$Group  <- grp

  pal <- c("No_Mets" = "#1b9e77", "Lymph_Node" = "#d95f02", "Distant" = "#7570b3")

  base_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 11, base_family = "Helvetica") +
    theme(legend.position = "right", panel.grid = element_blank())

  p_pca <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Group)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.9, alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_color_manual(values = pal, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = "Metastasis") +
    base_theme

  p_umap <- ggplot(um_df, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = Group)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.9, alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_color_manual(values = pal, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(x = "UMAP-1", y = "UMAP-2", color = "Metastasis") +
    base_theme

  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, paste0(tag, "_PCA_byMetastasis.pdf")),
         p_pca, width = 5.2, height = 4.2, device = cairo_pdf, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, paste0(tag, "_UMAP_byMetastasis.pdf")),
         p_umap, width = 5.2, height = 4.2, device = cairo_pdf, dpi = 300)

  message("✓ Saved: ", file.path(out_dir, paste0(tag, "_PCA_byMetastasis.pdf")))
  message("✓ Saved: ", file.path(out_dir, paste0(tag, "_UMAP_byMetastasis.pdf")))
}

## -------- 7) Run both sets ---------------------------------------------------
run_cpg_embeddings(sig_cpgs,     "CpG_SIG")
run_cpg_embeddings(top_var_cpgs, "CpG_VAR")
message("✅ Done.")
```

Permanova 
```{r}
###############################################################################
# PERMANOVA on CpG signatures (Euclidean on standardized features)
# Requires in the workspace:
#   - M_all  : matrix of M-values (rows = CpGs, cols = SampleID)
#   - meta_f : data.frame with SampleID and MetastasisStatus
#   - sig_cpgs (or top_var_cpgs): character vector of CpG IDs to use
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(vegan)
  library(readr)
  library(tibble)
})

set.seed(12345)

## ---- central output root ---------------------------------------------------
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
out_dir      <- file.path(results_root, "cpg_embeddings")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## ---- choose CpG panel ------------------------------------------------------
# Prefer the significant panel if available; otherwise fallback to top-variance
if (exists("sig_cpgs") && length(sig_cpgs) >= 3) {
  cpg_panel <- sig_cpgs
  panel_tag <- "SIG"
} else if (exists("top_var_cpgs") && length(top_var_cpgs) >= 3) {
  cpg_panel <- top_var_cpgs
  panel_tag <- "VAR"
} else {
  stop("No CpG panel found: expected 'sig_cpgs' or 'top_var_cpgs' in the workspace.")
}

# Build CpG×sample submatrix and align to metadata
stopifnot(exists("M_all"), is.matrix(M_all))
stopifnot(exists("meta_f"), is.data.frame(meta_f))

# Keep only CpGs present in M_all
cpg_panel <- intersect(cpg_panel, rownames(M_all))
if (length(cpg_panel) < 3) stop("Too few CpGs after intersecting with M_all.")

# Ensure MetastasisStatus exists
if (!"MetastasisStatus" %in% colnames(meta_f)) {
  stop("meta_f must contain a 'MetastasisStatus' column.")
}

# Filter metadata to samples we have
meta_use <- meta_f %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% colnames(M_all),
         !is.na(MetastasisStatus)) %>%
  mutate(MetastasisStatus = factor(MetastasisStatus,
                                   levels = c("No_Mets","Lymph_Node","Distant")))

# CpG matrix restricted to selected samples (rows=CpGs, cols=Samples)
M_sub <- M_all[cpg_panel, meta_use$SampleID, drop = FALSE]

# Transpose to samples×features and standardize features (columns)
X <- t(M_sub)
# Drop any zero-variance features to avoid numerical issues
nzv <- apply(X, 2, function(col) stats::sd(col, na.rm = TRUE)) > 0
X   <- X[, nzv, drop = FALSE]
if (ncol(X) < 2) stop("Too few informative CpGs (non-zero variance) for PERMANOVA.")

# Replace NA with feature means before scaling
for (j in seq_len(ncol(X))) {
  if (anyNA(X[, j])) {
    m <- mean(X[, j], na.rm = TRUE)
    X[is.na(X[, j]), j] <- m
  }
}
# Scale features (z-score)
X <- scale(X, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)

## ---- distance & PERMANOVA --------------------------------------------------
# Euclidean distance between samples
dist_mat <- dist(X, method = "euclidean")

# PERMANOVA; add more covariates if you’d like (e.g., + Array_Version)
permanova_res <- adonis2(dist_mat ~ MetastasisStatus,
                         data = meta_use,
                         permutations = 999, by = "margin")

print(permanova_res)

# Tidy-ish summary to console
R2 <- permanova_res$R2[match("MetastasisStatus", rownames(permanova_res))]
p  <- permanova_res$`Pr(>F)`[match("MetastasisStatus", rownames(permanova_res))]
cat(sprintf("\nPERMANOVA (%s panel): R^2 = %.3f, p = %.4g\n", panel_tag, R2, p))

## ---- save full table -------------------------------------------------------
out_csv <- file.path(out_dir, sprintf("PERMANOVA_%s_Euclidean.csv", panel_tag))
permanova_tbl <- permanova_res %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("Term")
write_csv(permanova_tbl, out_csv)
cat("✓ Wrote:", out_csv, "\n")
```

UMAP code Looking at grade site and MLH1
```{r}
###############################################################################
# CpG-level UMAPs with DISCRETE coloring by sample variables
# Points = CpGs. For each CpG and grouping variable (MLH1, Grade, Site),
# assign the group with the highest mean z-scored methylation (min effect gap).
# Saves one panel PDF **and a legend-only PDF** per variable.
#
# ✅ Fix included:
# If `sig_cpgs_mat` (CpG x sample M-values) is NOT already in memory,
# this script will automatically load it (and `meta_f`) from your EWAS outputs:
#   Results/results_ewas_<any|ln|dist>/H6/ewas_inputs_for_embeddings.rds
# and will select significant CpGs from Tier3_topTable.csv (p < p_select).
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tibble); library(readr)
  library(ggplot2); library(uwot);  library(forcats); library(cowplot)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
})

set.seed(20250809)

## -------- central output root ----------------------------------------------
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
out_dir      <- file.path(results_root, "cpg_umap_by_meta_discrete")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## -------- choose which phenotype to pull from (if we need to auto-load) -----
# Use one of: "any", "ln", "dist"
pheno_tag_to_pull <- "any"

## -------- CpG selection threshold (used only if we auto-build the matrix) ---
p_select         <- 1e-3     # significance threshold for picking CpGs
min_cpg_required <- 200      # fallback to variance if fewer than this are found
top_var_k        <- 5000     # fallback: top-K variance CpGs

## -------- helper to load inputs if `sig_cpgs_mat` is missing ----------------
## --- REPLACE the whole load_sig_matrix_if_needed() with this version --------
load_sig_matrix_if_needed <- function() {
  # 1) Already present? use them.
  if (exists("sig_cpgs_mat") && is.matrix(sig_cpgs_mat) &&
      exists("meta_f")       && is.data.frame(meta_f) &&
      "SampleID" %in% names(meta_f)) {
    message("Using in-memory sig_cpgs_mat and meta_f.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  # 2) If M_cb + meta_f are available in the workspace, derive sig_cpgs_mat from them.
  if (exists("M_cb") && is.matrix(M_cb) &&
      exists("meta_f") && is.data.frame(meta_f) && "SampleID" %in% names(meta_f)) {
    message("Building sig_cpgs_mat from in-memory M_cb/meta_f and Tier3 results …")

    ph_dir   <- file.path(results_root, paste0("results_ewas_", pheno_tag_to_pull), "H6")
    tt_csv   <- file.path(ph_dir, "Tier3_topTable.csv")
    fits_rds <- file.path(ph_dir, "ewas_fits.rds")

    # Get Tier3 top table (CpG + P.Value)
    if (file.exists(tt_csv)) {
      tt_df <- readr::read_csv(tt_csv, show_col_types = FALSE)
      if (!("CpG" %in% names(tt_df)) && "CpG_ID" %in% names(tt_df)) {
        tt_df <- dplyr::rename(tt_df, CpG = CpG_ID)
      }
    } else if (file.exists(fits_rds)) {
      message("Tier3_topTable.csv not found; deriving from ewas_fits.rds")
      fits <- readRDS(fits_rds)
      fit3 <- if (inherits(fits$Tier3, "MArrayLM")) fits$Tier3 else fits$Tier3$fit
      tt_df <- limma::topTable(fit3, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf) %>%
        tibble::rownames_to_column("CpG")
    } else {
      stop("Could not find Tier3 results under: ", ph_dir,
           "\nNeed either Tier3_topTable.csv or ewas_fits.rds.")
    }

    if (!("CpG" %in% names(tt_df))) stop("TopTable lacks CpG (or CpG_ID) column.")
    if (!("P.Value" %in% names(tt_df))) stop("TopTable lacks P.Value column.")

    # Pick significant CpGs; fallback to variance if too few
    sig_cpgs <- tt_df %>%
      dplyr::filter(P.Value < p_select) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
      dplyr::pull(CpG) %>%
      intersect(rownames(M_cb))

    if (length(sig_cpgs) < min_cpg_required) {
      message("Only ", length(sig_cpgs), " CpGs passed p < ", p_select,
              " — falling back to top-variance CpGs (K = ", top_var_k, ").")
      rv <- matrixStats::rowVars(M_cb, na.rm = TRUE)
      top_var <- names(sort(rv, decreasing = TRUE))[seq_len(min(top_var_k, length(rv)))]
      sig_cpgs <- intersect(top_var, rownames(M_cb))
    }

    sig_cpgs_mat <<- M_cb[sig_cpgs, , drop = FALSE]
    message("sig_cpgs_mat built: ", nrow(sig_cpgs_mat), " CpGs × ", ncol(sig_cpgs_mat), " samples.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  # 3) Last resort: look for the pre-baked inputs RDS (original path).
  ph_dir   <- file.path(results_root, paste0("results_ewas_", pheno_tag_to_pull), "H6")
  inputs_rds <- file.path(ph_dir, "ewas_inputs_for_embeddings.rds")
  if (file.exists(inputs_rds)) {
    message("Loading pre-baked inputs from: ", inputs_rds)
    inp <- readRDS(inputs_rds)
    if (is.null(inp$M_cb) || is.null(inp$meta_f)) {
      stop("ewas_inputs_for_embeddings.rds present but lacks M_cb/meta_f.")
    }
    M_cb  <<- inp$M_cb
    meta_f <<- inp$meta_f

    # Derive CpGs exactly as above
    tt_csv   <- file.path(ph_dir, "Tier3_topTable.csv")
    fits_rds <- file.path(ph_dir, "ewas_fits.rds")
    if (file.exists(tt_csv)) {
      tt_df <- readr::read_csv(tt_csv, show_col_types = FALSE)
      if (!("CpG" %in% names(tt_df)) && "CpG_ID" %in% names(tt_df)) {
        tt_df <- dplyr::rename(tt_df, CpG = CpG_ID)
      }
    } else if (file.exists(fits_rds)) {
      fits <- readRDS(fits_rds)
      fit3 <- if (inherits(fits$Tier3, "MArrayLM")) fits$Tier3 else fits$Tier3$fit
      tt_df <- limma::topTable(fit3, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf) %>%
        tibble::rownames_to_column("CpG")
    } else {
      stop("Could not find Tier3 results under: ", ph_dir)
    }

    if (!("CpG" %in% names(tt_df))) stop("TopTable lacks CpG (or CpG_ID) column.")
    if (!("P.Value" %in% names(tt_df))) stop("TopTable lacks P.Value column.")

    sig_cpgs <- tt_df %>%
      dplyr::filter(P.Value < p_select) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
      dplyr::pull(CpG) %>%
      intersect(rownames(M_cb))

    if (length(sig_cpgs) < min_cpg_required) {
      message("Only ", length(sig_cpgs), " CpGs passed p < ", p_select,
              " — falling back to top-variance CpGs (K = ", top_var_k, ").")
      rv <- matrixStats::rowVars(M_cb, na.rm = TRUE)
      top_var <- names(sort(rv, decreasing = TRUE))[seq_len(min(top_var_k, length(rv)))]
      sig_cpgs <- intersect(top_var, rownames(M_cb))
    }

    sig_cpgs_mat <<- M_cb[sig_cpgs, , drop = FALSE]
    message("sig_cpgs_mat built from pre-baked inputs: ", nrow(sig_cpgs_mat), " × ", ncol(sig_cpgs_mat))
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  # 4) If none of the above worked:
  stop(
    "No inputs available.\n",
    "- Preferred: run EWAS script so M_cb/meta_f are in memory, then re-run.\n",
    "- Or save pre-baked inputs at ",
    file.path(results_root, paste0('results_ewas_', pheno_tag_to_pull), 'H6/ewas_inputs_for_embeddings.rds')
  )
}

## -------- build/confirm inputs ----------------------------------------------
load_sig_matrix_if_needed()

# basic checks
stopifnot(exists("sig_cpgs_mat"), is.matrix(sig_cpgs_mat))
stopifnot(exists("meta_f"), is.data.frame(meta_f), "SampleID" %in% names(meta_f))

## -------- align samples ------------------------------------------------------
keep_samps <- intersect(colnames(sig_cpgs_mat), meta_f$SampleID)
if (length(keep_samps) < 5) stop("Too few overlapping samples between matrix and metadata.")
M_cpg  <- sig_cpgs_mat[, keep_samps, drop = FALSE]
meta_f <- meta_f %>% filter(SampleID %in% keep_samps)
meta_f <- meta_f[match(colnames(M_cpg), meta_f$SampleID), , drop = FALSE]

## -------- z-score per CpG across samples ------------------------------------
row_sd <- apply(M_cpg, 1, function(x) stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE))
ok     <- is.finite(row_sd) & row_sd > 0
M_cpg  <- M_cpg[ok, , drop = FALSE]

Z_cpg  <- t(scale(t(M_cpg)))
Z_cpg[!is.finite(Z_cpg)] <- 0

## -------- single UMAP embedding for CpGs ------------------------------------
umap_emb <- uwot::umap(
  Z_cpg, n_neighbors = 30, min_dist = 0.2, metric = "cosine",
  n_components = 2, verbose = TRUE
)
emb <- as.data.frame(umap_emb); colnames(emb) <- c("UMAP_1","UMAP_2")
emb$CpG <- rownames(Z_cpg)

## -------- optional: nearest gene for labels ---------------------------------
epic_anno <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
common    <- intersect(emb$CpG, rownames(epic_anno))
gene_nm   <- rep(NA_character_, nrow(emb))
if (length(common) > 0) {
  tmp <- epic_anno[common, "UCSC_RefGene_Name"]
  g1  <- vapply(strsplit(as.character(tmp), ";", fixed = TRUE), `[`, "", 1)
  gene_nm[match(common, emb$CpG)] <- ifelse(g1 == "" | is.na(g1), NA, g1)
}
emb$Gene <- gene_nm

## -------- tidy/encode metadata factors --------------------------------------
if ("MLH1" %in% names(meta_f) && is.numeric(meta_f$MLH1)) {
  meta_f$MLH1 <- factor(ifelse(meta_f$MLH1 == 1, "Loss", "Intact"))
}
if ("Grade" %in% names(meta_f)) meta_f$Grade <- factor(meta_f$Grade)
```
