```{r}
# accept either `site` or `Site`
if ("site" %in% names(meta_f)) {
  meta_f$site <- factor(meta_f$site)
} else if ("Site" %in% names(meta_f)) {
  meta_f$site <- factor(meta_f$Site)
}

## -------- winner-take-all labeler with min effect gap -----------------------
assign_cpg_labels <- function(Zmat, groups, min_effect = 0.15) {
  groups <- droplevels(groups)
  if (any(is.na(groups))) stop("Grouping contains NA; subset first.")
  levs <- levels(groups)
  grp_means <- sapply(levs, function(lv) rowMeans(Zmat[, groups == lv, drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.matrix(grp_means)) grp_means <- cbind(grp_means)

  if (ncol(grp_means) == 2) {
    diff12 <- grp_means[,2] - grp_means[,1]
    lab <- ifelse(abs(diff12) >= min_effect,
                  ifelse(diff12 > 0, levs[2], levs[1]),
                  "No clear difference")
  } else {
    max_idx    <- apply(grp_means, 1, which.max)
    max_val    <- apply(grp_means, 1, max)
    second_max <- apply(grp_means, 1, function(v) sort(v, partial = length(v)-1)[length(v)-1])
    gap <- max_val - second_max
    lab <- ifelse(gap >= min_effect, levs[max_idx], "No clear difference")
  }
  factor(lab, levels = c(setdiff(levs, character(0)), "No clear difference"))
}

## -------- legend saver -------------------------------------------------------
save_legend_pdf <- function(plot_with_legend, out_pdf, width = 3.5, height = 2) {
  leg <- cowplot::get_legend(plot_with_legend)
  leg_gg <- cowplot::ggdraw(leg)
  ggsave(out_pdf, leg_gg, device = cairo_pdf, width = width, height = height, dpi = 300)
}

## -------- plotting helper (returns plot WITH legend) ------------------------
build_plot_with_legend <- function(emb_df, label_col, title, pt_size = 0.55) {
  levs <- levels(emb_df[[label_col]])
  base_cols <- scales::hue_pal()(max(1, length(levs) - 1))
  cols <- setNames(
    c(base_cols, "grey70"),
    c(levs[levs != "No clear difference"], "No clear difference")
  )

  ggplot(emb_df, aes(UMAP_1, UMAP_2, color = .data[[label_col]])) +
    geom_point(size = pt_size, alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cols, drop = FALSE, name = NULL) +
    coord_equal() +
    labs(x = "UMAP-1", y = "UMAP-2", title = title) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 11, base_family = "Helvetica") +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position  = "right"
    )
}

## -------- driver: make one panel + legend PDF per variable ------------------
make_panel <- function(var_name, pretty, filename, min_effect = 0.15) {
  if (!var_name %in% names(meta_f)) { message("Skipping ", var_name, " (not found)."); return(invisible(NULL)) }
  g_all <- meta_f[[var_name]]
  keep  <- !is.na(g_all)
  if (sum(keep) < 4 || length(unique(g_all[keep])) < 2) {
    message("Skipping ", var_name, " (too few samples/levels after NA removal)."); return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  labs <- assign_cpg_labels(Z_cpg[, keep, drop = FALSE], factor(g_all[keep]), min_effect = min_effect)
  emb_tmp <- emb
  emb_tmp[[pretty]] <- labs

  p_with_legend <- build_plot_with_legend(emb_tmp, label_col = pretty, title = pretty)

  # Save legendless panel
  panel_pdf <- file.path(out_dir, filename)
  ggsave(panel_pdf, p_with_legend + theme(legend.position = "none"),
         device = cairo_pdf, width = 6.5, height = 5.5, dpi = 300)
  message("✓ Saved: ", panel_pdf)

  # Save legend-only
  legend_pdf <- file.path(out_dir, sub("\\.pdf$", "_legend.pdf", filename))
  save_legend_pdf(p_with_legend, legend_pdf, width = 3.5, height = 2.0)
  message("✓ Saved: ", legend_pdf)

  invisible(list(panel = panel_pdf, legend = legend_pdf))
}

## -------- run the panels -----------------------------------------------------
make_panel("MLH1",  "MLH1 winner",  "CpG_UMAP_by_MLH1_discrete.pdf",  min_effect = 0.15)
make_panel("Grade", "Grade winner", "CpG_UMAP_by_Grade_discrete.pdf", min_effect = 0.20)
make_panel("site",  "Site winner",  "CpG_UMAP_by_Site_discrete.pdf",  min_effect = 0.20)

message("All done. Files in: ", normalizePath(out_dir))
```

UMAP with many peramiters 
```{r}
###############################################################################
# CpG-level UMAP param sweep on EWAS-SIGNIFICANT CpGs ONLY (points = CpGs)
# - Uses the same SIG CpG set as your "good" plot (prefers 'tt' in memory;
#   otherwise reads Tier3 for the chosen phenotype).
# - Asserts rows = CpGs; bails if orientation flips.
# - Sweeps safe UMAP params; n_neighbors is capped to < #CpGs automatically.
# - Saves one PDF per param combo: .../Results/cpg_embeddings_sig_grid/
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tibble); library(ggplot2)
  library(matrixStats); library(uwot); library(glue); library(limma)
  library(tidyr)   # <-- needed for expand_grid
  library(rlang)   # <-- needed for sym() in rename
})

set.seed(12345)

## -------- central output root ----------------------------------------------
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
out_dir      <- file.path(results_root, "cpg_embeddings_sig_grid")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## -------- inputs expected in workspace --------------------------------------
stopifnot(exists("M_all"), is.matrix(M_all))
stopifnot(exists("meta_f"), is.data.frame(meta_f), "SampleID" %in% names(meta_f))

## -------- ensure a metastasis grouping exists -------------------------------
if (!"MetastasisStatus" %in% colnames(meta_f)) {
  guess_cols <- c("any_mets","distant","ln_only")
  if (all(guess_cols %in% colnames(meta_f))) {
    meta_f <- meta_f %>%
      mutate(
        MetastasisStatus = case_when(
          distant == 1 ~ "Distant",
          ln_only == 1 ~ "Lymph_Node",
          any_mets == 0 ~ "No_Mets",
          TRUE ~ NA_character_
        )
      )
  } else {
    stop("meta_f must have MetastasisStatus or (any_mets, distant, ln_only).")
  }
}
meta_f$MetastasisStatus <- factor(meta_f$MetastasisStatus,
                                  levels = c("No_Mets","Lymph_Node","Distant"))

## -------- choose significant CpGs (match the 'good' plot) -------------------
phenotype_to_use <- "any"   # change if you want sig CpGs from another phenotype
p_cutoff         <- .01
top_N            <- 5000     # try 500–1000 for clean structure

get_sig_cpgs_from_fits <- function(results_root, phen_tag, p_cutoff, top_N) {
  fit_file <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{phen_tag}"), "H6", "ewas_fits.rds")
  if (!file.exists(fit_file)) return(character(0))
  fits <- readRDS(fit_file)
  fit3 <- if (inherits(fits$Tier3, "MArrayLM")) fits$Tier3 else fits$Tier3$fit
  tt   <- topTable(fit3, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf, p.value = 1, adjust.method = "none") %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("CpG")
  tt %>%
    filter(is.finite(P.Value), P.Value < p_cutoff) %>%
    arrange(P.Value) %>%
    pull(CpG) %>%
    head(top_N)
}

sig_cpgs <- character(0)
if (exists("tt")) {
  tt_df <- as.data.frame(tt, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  # 1) If rownames look like cg IDs, promote them
  rn <- rownames(tt_df)
  if (!is.null(rn)) {
    rn_cg_frac <- mean(grepl("^cg\\d{5,}$", as.character(rn)))
    if (is.finite(rn_cg_frac) && rn_cg_frac > 0.5) {
      tt_df <- tibble::rownames_to_column(tt_df, var = "CpG")
    }
  }

  # 2) If we still don't have a CpG column, try common names
  if (!("CpG" %in% names(tt_df))) {
    common_candidates <- c("CpG","CpG_ID","Probe_ID","ID","Name","cgid","probe","probe_id")
    hit <- intersect(common_candidates, names(tt_df))
    if (length(hit)) {
      tt_df <- dplyr::rename(tt_df, CpG = !!rlang::sym(hit[1]))
    } else {
      # 3) Heuristic scan: pick the column with >50% cg-like entries
      cg_like_frac <- vapply(tt_df, function(col) {
        v <- as.character(col)
        mean(grepl("^cg\\d{5,}$", v))
      }, numeric(1))
      if (length(cg_like_frac) && max(cg_like_frac, na.rm = TRUE) > 0.5) {
        best_col <- names(which.max(cg_like_frac))
        tt_df <- dplyr::rename(tt_df, CpG = !!rlang::sym(best_col))
      }
    }
  }

  # 4) Final guardrail
  if (!("CpG" %in% names(tt_df))) {
    stop("‘tt’ present but CpG IDs are still not detectable: ",
         "no CpG-like rownames and no column with cg-style IDs. ",
         "Add a CpG/CpG_ID column or ensure rownames are cg IDs.")
  }
  if (!("P.Value" %in% names(tt_df))) {
    stop("‘tt’ is missing a P.Value column. Provide limma::topTable output.")
  }

  # 5) Build the significant set
  sig_cpgs <- tt_df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(CpG = as.character(CpG)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(is.finite(P.Value), P.Value < p_cutoff) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
    dplyr::pull(CpG) %>%
    unique() %>%
    head(top_N)
}
if (length(sig_cpgs) == 0) {
  sig_cpgs <- get_sig_cpgs_from_fits(results_root, phenotype_to_use, p_cutoff, top_N)
}
stopifnot(length(sig_cpgs) > 0)

## -------- align samples & CpGs (intersection only) --------------------------
keep_samples <- intersect(colnames(M_all), meta_f$SampleID)
if (length(keep_samples) < 5) stop("Too few overlapping samples between M_all and meta_f.")
M_all  <- M_all[, keep_samples, drop = FALSE]
meta_f <- meta_f[match(keep_samples, meta_f$SampleID), , drop = FALSE]

sig_cpgs <- intersect(sig_cpgs, rownames(M_all))
if (length(sig_cpgs) < 10) stop("Fewer than 10 significant CpGs overlap M_all; cannot embed.")

M_sub <- M_all[sig_cpgs, , drop = FALSE]  # rows = CpGs, cols = samples

## -------- z-score per CpG across samples; ASSERT orientation ----------------
Z <- t(scale(t(M_sub)))
Z[!is.finite(Z)] <- 0
stopifnot(nrow(Z) == length(sig_cpgs), ncol(Z) == ncol(M_sub))  # rows are CpGs!

## -------- label each CpG by group with highest mean across samples ----------
assign_cpg_group <- function(M_sub, meta_df, group_col = "MetastasisStatus") {
  g <- droplevels(meta_df[[group_col]])
  if (any(is.na(g))) stop("Grouping has NA; clean meta_f first.")
  split_idx <- split(seq_len(nrow(meta_df)), g)
  labs <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(M_sub)), function(i) {
    means <- vapply(split_idx, function(ix) mean(M_sub[i, ix], na.rm = TRUE), numeric(1))
    names(means)[which.max(means)]
  })
  factor(labs, levels = levels(g))
}
grp_cpg <- assign_cpg_group(M_sub, meta_f, "MetastasisStatus")
stopifnot(length(grp_cpg) == nrow(Z))

## -------- UMAP runner + plotting -------------------------------------------
run_umap <- function(X, n_neighbors, min_dist, metric = "cosine",
                     pca = min(30, ncol(X) - 1), init = "spectral",
                     repulsion_strength = 1, set_op_mix_ratio = 1,
                     dens_scale = NULL, n_trees = 50L, seed = 123) {
  set.seed(seed)
  uwot::umap(
    X,
    n_neighbors        = n_neighbors,
    min_dist           = min_dist,
    metric             = metric,
    pca                = if (pca > 1) pca else NULL,
    init               = init,
    repulsion_strength = repulsion_strength,
    set_op_mix_ratio   = set_op_mix_ratio,
    dens_scale         = dens_scale,
    nn_method          = "annoy",
    n_trees            = n_trees,
    search_k           = 2 * n_neighbors * n_trees,
    verbose            = FALSE
  )
}

plot_umap <- function(df, pal, out_pdf, width = 5.2, height = 4.2) {
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = Group)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.9, alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_color_manual(values = pal, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(x = "UMAP-1", y = "UMAP-2", color = "Metastasis") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 11, base_family = "Helvetica") +
    theme(legend.position = "right", panel.grid = element_blank())
  ggsave(out_pdf, p, device = cairo_pdf, width = width, height = height, dpi = 300)
}

pal <- c("No_Mets" = "#1b9e77", "Lymph_Node" = "#d95f02", "Distant" = "#7570b3")

## -------- safe param grid (auto-caps n_neighbors to < n_cpg) ----------------
n_cpg   <- nrow(Z)
base_nn <- c(10, 20, 30, 50)
safe_nn <- sort(unique(pmax(2, pmin(base_nn, n_cpg - 1))))  # ensure < n_cpg

param_grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  n_neighbors = safe_nn,
  min_dist    = c(0.05, 0.2, 0.4),
  metric      = c("cosine", "euclidean"),
  dens_scale  = c(NA, 0.7)   # NA=off; 0.7=densMAP-ish
) %>%
  filter(!(metric == "euclidean" & isTRUE(dens_scale == 0.7)))  # optional trim

message("SIG CpGs: ", n_cpg, " | Samples: ", ncol(Z),
        " | n_neighbors tried: ", paste(safe_nn, collapse = ", "))

apply(param_grid, 1, function(row) {
  nn   <- as.integer(row[["n_neighbors"]])
  md   <- as.numeric(row[["min_dist"]])
  met  <- as.character(row[["metric"]])
  dens <- if (is.na(row[["dens_scale"]])) NULL else as.numeric(row[["dens_scale"]])

  um <- run_umap(
    Z,
    n_neighbors = nn,
    min_dist    = md,
    metric      = met,
    dens_scale  = dens,
    pca         = min(30, ncol(Z) - 1),
    init        = "spectral",
    repulsion_strength = 1,
    set_op_mix_ratio   = 1,
    n_trees      = 50L,
    seed         = 123
  )

  um_df <- tibble(
    CpG   = rownames(Z),
    UMAP1 = um[, 1],
    UMAP2 = um[, 2],
    Group = grp_cpg
  )

  tag      <- glue("SIGonly_{phenotype_to_use}_p{format(p_cutoff, scientific = TRUE)}_top{top_N}")
  dens_tag <- if (is.null(dens)) "" else glue("_dens{dens}")
  fname    <- glue("{tag}_UMAP_nn{nn}_md{md}_{met}{dens_tag}.pdf")
  out      <- file.path(out_dir, fname)

  plot_umap(um_df, pal, out_pdf = out)
  message("✓ Saved: ", basename(out), "  [points=", nrow(um_df), " CpGs]")
  invisible(NULL)
})

message("✅ Done. PDFs in: ", normalizePath(out_dir))
```

Looking at positions for top CpG's
```{r}
###############################################################################
# Figure: TSS vs Body methylation across metastasis groups
# Author: Alos Diallo
# Style: Publication / Clinical Epigenetics ready
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(readr); library(glue)
  library(ggplot2); library(purrr); library(patchwork)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
})

# ---- Inputs --------------------------------------------------------------
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
out_dir_ind  <- file.path(results_root, "GeneRegionSummaries_clean")
dir.create(out_dir_ind, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

out_dir_comb <- file.path(results_root, "CombinedFigures_clean")
dir.create(out_dir_comb, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

beta_rds <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache", "beta_comb_qc.rds")
meta_csv <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

# Genes
hyper_genes <- c("JMJD8","ADRA2C","SLIT2","ABL1","CCDC60","C8orf33","SPTBN4")
hypo_genes  <- c("CAPN13","LINC00424","GALNT14","ANK1","FER1L6-AS2","C10orf11")

genes_of_interest <- c(hyper_genes, hypo_genes)

# ---- Load data -----------------------------------------------------------
beta_comb <- {
  obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
  if (is.list(obj) && !is.null(obj$beta)) obj$beta else obj
}
meta <- read_csv(meta_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
    mets_progression = case_when(
      Distant_Mets == 1 ~ "Distant Mets",
      ln_only == 1      ~ "LN-only Mets",
      TRUE              ~ "No Mets"
    ),
    mets_progression = factor(mets_progression,
                              levels = c("No Mets","LN-only Mets","Distant Mets"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(SampleID, mets_progression)

common_ids <- intersect(colnames(beta_comb), meta$SampleID)
beta_comb <- beta_comb[, common_ids, drop = FALSE]
meta      <- filter(meta, SampleID %in% common_ids)

# ---- Annotation ----------------------------------------------------------
anno <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19) %>% as.data.frame()

get_gene_cpgs <- function(gene_symbol, beta_mat, anno_df) {
  df <- anno_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      UCSC_RefGene_Name == gene_symbol,
      UCSC_RefGene_Group %in% c("TSS200","TSS1500","5'UTR","1stExon","Body")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(Name, UCSC_RefGene_Group) %>%
    dplyr::filter(Name %in% rownames(beta_mat))

  list(
    tss = df %>%
      dplyr::filter(UCSC_RefGene_Group %in% c("TSS200","TSS1500","5'UTR","1stExon")) %>%
      dplyr::pull(Name),
    body = df %>%
      dplyr::filter(UCSC_RefGene_Group == "Body") %>%
      dplyr::pull(Name)
  )
}

# ---- Helper functions ----------------------------------------------------
to_m <- function(b) log2((b + 1e-6) / (1 - b + 1e-6))

collapse_region <- function(cpgs, beta_mat, label){
  if (!length(cpgs)) return(NULL)
  B <- beta_mat[cpgs, , drop = FALSE]
  M <- t(apply(B, 1, to_m))
  tibble(
    SampleID      = colnames(B),
    Region        = label,
    BetaCollapsed = colMeans(B, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mmean         = colMeans(M, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

# ---- Plot function -------------------------------------------------------
make_gene_plot <- function(gene_symbol, beta_mat, meta_df, anno_df, save_dir) {

  cpgs <- get_gene_cpgs(gene_symbol, beta_mat, anno_df)
  if (!length(cpgs$tss) && !length(cpgs$body)) {
    message("Skipping ", gene_symbol, ": no TSS or Body CpGs.")
    return(NULL)
  }

  df_tss  <- collapse_region(cpgs$tss,  beta_mat, "TSS")
  df_body <- collapse_region(cpgs$body, beta_mat, "Body")

  scores <- bind_rows(df_tss, df_body) %>%
    left_join(meta_df, by = "SampleID") %>%
    filter(!is.na(mets_progression))

  have_both <- all(c("TSS","Body") %in% unique(scores$Region))

  stars_df <- NULL
  if (have_both) {
    df_wide <- scores %>%
      dplyr::select(SampleID, Region, Mmean, mets_progression) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Region, values_from = Mmean)

    stars_df <- df_wide %>%
      group_by(mets_progression) %>%
      group_modify(~{
        d <- .x
        ok <- complete.cases(d$Body, d$TSS)
        if (sum(ok) < 3) return(tibble(p = NA_real_))
        wt <- wilcox.test(d$Body[ok], d$TSS[ok], paired = TRUE, exact = FALSE)
        tibble(p = wt$p.value)
      }) %>%
      mutate(
        label = case_when(
          p < 0.001 ~ "***",
          p < 0.01  ~ "**",
          p < 0.05  ~ "*",
          TRUE      ~ ""
        )
      ) %>%
      left_join(
        scores %>%
          group_by(mets_progression) %>%
          summarise(y = pmin(1.05, max(BetaCollapsed, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.05),
                    .groups = "drop"),
        by = "mets_progression"
      )
  }

  p <- ggplot(scores, aes(x = Region, y = BetaCollapsed, fill = Region)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.6, alpha = 0.85, color = "gray40") +
    geom_jitter(aes(group = SampleID), width = 0.15, size = 0.7, alpha = 0.6) +
    facet_wrap(~ mets_progression, ncol = 3) +
    { if (!is.null(stars_df))
        geom_text(data = stars_df,
                  aes(x = 1.5, y = y, label = label),
                  size = 4, vjust = 0, inherit.aes = FALSE) } +
    { if (!have_both)
        annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = 1.05,
                 label = "Only one region available",
                 size = 3.2, color = "gray40", fontface = "italic") } +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("TSS" = "#1f78b4", "Body" = "#e31a1c")) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.1)) +
    labs(title = gene_symbol, x = NULL, y = expression(paste(beta, "-value"))) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 8)
    )

  ggsave(file.path(save_dir, paste0(gene_symbol, "_TSSvsBody_betaPlot.pdf")),
         p, width = 90/25.4, height = 60/25.4, device = cairo_pdf)

  p
}

# ---- Generate individual plots ------------------------------------------
plots_list <- map(genes_of_interest, make_gene_plot, beta_comb, meta, anno, out_dir_ind)
names(plots_list) <- genes_of_interest
plots_list <- plots_list[!sapply(plots_list, is.null)]

# ---- Combine into 2-row figure ------------------------------------------
hyper_plots <- plots_list[hyper_genes]
hypo_plots  <- plots_list[hypo_genes]

combined_hyper <- wrap_plots(hyper_plots, ncol = 4) + plot_annotation(title = "Hypermethylated Genes")
combined_hypo  <- wrap_plots(hypo_plots,  ncol = 4) + plot_annotation(title = "Hypomethylated Genes")

final_fig <- combined_hyper / combined_hypo +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1,1)) &
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12))

# ---- Save final figures --------------------------------------------------
ggsave(file.path(out_dir_comb, "Figure_Hyper_vs_Hypo_2Rows_Clean_170x225mm.pdf"),
       final_fig, width = 170/25.4, height = 225/25.4, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir_comb, "Figure_Hyper_vs_Hypo_2Rows_Clean_225x170mm.pdf"),
       final_fig, width = 225/25.4, height = 170/25.4, device = cairo_pdf)

cat("✓ Saved per-gene and combined clean figures:\n", out_dir_comb, "\n")
```
